Inspired by this principle, we introduce Topological Neural Dynamics (TND), a sequence modeling framework that shifts computation from layer-wise to neuron-wise dynamics. TND represents a neural system as a directed neuron graph, an interaction operator, and a local dynamics function, where each neuron evolves independently and collective computation emerges from interactions through the explicit graph topology. We instantiate TND as a discrete-time graph-coupled dynamical system and evaluate it as a case study on a behavior cloning task in single-player Pong. Compared with Vanilla RNN, Sparse RNN, LSTM, Closed-form continuous-time neural network (CfC), and Transformer baselines, TND achieves the best catch rate and a mean of 17.47 consecutive catches per round, more than three times that of the strongest baseline. These results suggest that shifting from layer-wise to neuron-wise dynamics provides an effective inductive bias for sequence modeling.

</details>


### [257] [NASDAQ: Normalized Observation Space Dynamics-Augmented Q-Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21297)
*Xinwei Liu,Junyuan Liang,Zicong Hong,Jianting Zhang,Wuhui Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对低维观测的归一化方法（NASDAQ），通过平衡重构损失解决了观测预测强化学习中维度过大导致性能下降的问题，在多种任务中取得了优于现有模型基和自我预测RL方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 观测预测强化学习（observation-predictive RL）在低维观测的挑战性任务中表现不佳，作者发现根本原因是不同观测维度的重构损失不平衡——值范围大的维度主导损失，导致智能体忽略小范围维度，性能下降。

Method: 提出一种针对在线RL的观测归一化方法，平衡各维度的损失和梯度；在此基础上构建NASDAQ框架，将价值学习与两个辅助任务（短期价值预测、下一归一化观测预测）耦合。

Result: 在多种任务上，NASDAQ与最先进的基于模型和自我预测RL方法相比，取得了竞争性或更优的性能，同时训练时间显著减少。

Conclusion: 观测归一化能够有效解决低维观测中重构损失不平衡的问题，为观测预测RL提供统一处理低维和高维输入的方法，兼顾性能与效率。

Abstract: Augmenting model-free reinforcement learning (RL) with representations learned through observation dynamics prediction (observation-predictive RL) can improve sample efficiency and performance, with minor modifications and limited additional computation. However, this approach still struggles in challenging tasks with low-dimensional observations. In this paper, we identify a key factor behind this problem: unbalanced reconstruction losses across observation dimensions, where dimensions with larger value ranges dominate the loss. This encourages the agent to neglect dimensions with relatively small ranges, leading to degraded performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel normalization method tailored to online RL, which normalizes low-dimensional observations and balances the resulting losses and gradients. Beyond balancing reconstruction losses, observation normalization enables dynamics prediction to be performed in a normalized observation space, thereby providing a unified treatment of low- and high-dimensional inputs (e.g., physical states and images). Building on this idea, we further introduce Normalized Observation Space Dynamics-Augmented Q-learning (NASDAQ), a framework for observation-predictive RL applicable across diverse domains. NASDAQ learns state-action representations by coupling value learning with two auxiliary tasks: short-term value prediction and next normalized observation prediction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NASDAQ achieves competitive or superior performance compared with state-of-the-art model-based and self-predictive RL methods, while requiring significantly less training wall-time.

</details>


### [258] [Task-Differentiated Atomic Skill Expansion and Routing for Continual Learning Across Highly Heterogeneous Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21307)
*Jiacheng Wang,Xinjia He,Qi Ding,Yutao Yang,Jie Zhou,Liyang Yu,Liang Dou,Qin Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TASER框架，通过原子技能扩展与动态路由解决高度异构持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，并构建了包含19个任务的HeteroCLBench基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持续学习方法假设任务间语义相关或结构相似，但在高度异构场景下（任务推理模式和输入输出格式差异大），存在灾难性遗忘和容量分配低效的问题。

Method: TASER框架包含三部分：1) 原子技能增量学习，基于任务差异和模型不确定性动态扩展容量；2) 正交增强技能检测，保持技能语义独立可复用；3) 技能动态路由机制，通过轻量级门控组合任务相关技能。

Result: 在HeteroCLBench（19个任务，9个认知维度）上，TASER在可塑性和抗遗忘方面持续优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: TASER有效解决了高度异构持续学习的挑战，验证了动态技能扩展与路由机制的有效性。

Abstract: Continual learning (CL) is commonly studied under the assumption that sequential tasks are semantically related or structurally similar. However, in highly heterogeneous settings, where tasks differ substantially in reasoning patterns and input-output formats, existing methods often suffer from catastrophic forgetting and inefficient capacity allocation. To address this challenge, we propose Task-differentiated Atomic Skill Expansion and Routing (\texttt{TASER}), a CL framework that jointly determines how many new atomic skills to introduce for each task and which skills to activate. The framework first uses atomic skill incremental learning to dynamically expand capacity based on task divergence and model uncertainty. It then applies orthogonality-enhanced skill detection to ensure these skills remain semantically distinct and independently reusable. Finally, a skill dynamic routing mechanism composes task-relevant skills through lightweight task-conditioned gating. We further introduce \texttt{HeteroCLBench}, a highly heterogeneous benchmark for CL, comprising 19 diverse tasks across 9 cognitive dimensions under a standardized sequential protocol. Experiments on \texttt{HeteroCLBench} show that \texttt{TASER} consistently outperforms strong baselines by improving plasticity and reducing catastrophic forgetting.

</details>


### [259] [Objective-Behavior Alignment: Diagnostics for MORL Policy Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21321)
*Antonio Mone,Zuzanna Osika,Florian Felten,Pradeep K. Murukannaiah,Mark Fuge,Frans A. Oliehoek,Luciano Cavalcante Siebert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种用于多目标强化学习的探索性诊断工作流，能自动揭示Pareto前沿上目标值无法体现的行为差异，并提供量化和可视化工具支持策略检查。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多目标RL通过标量化为单一目标，权重微小变化会导致策略剧变；而现有MORL方法虽生成Pareto策略集，但仅通过价值向量呈现策略，掩盖了行为层面的显著差异。

Method: 提出一种探索性诊断工作流，自动识别Pareto前沿上目标值无法反映的行为变化，结合定量分析与可视化工具支持策略检查。

Result: 在简单网格世界验证了方法的有效性，并成功扩展到连续控制基准任务，表明方法随问题复杂度增加仍保持有效性。

Conclusion: 仅靠期望回报评估策略会遗漏重要行为差异，所提诊断工作流能有效揭示这些隐藏变化，辅助决策者更好地理解和选择策略。

Abstract: Real-world decision-making often requires optimizing multiple competing objectives simultaneously. In reinforcement learning (RL), this is typically addressed by combining reward signals into a single scalar objective via a scalarization function, which can be fragile: small changes in the weights can induce drastically different policies. Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) instead produces sets of policies that explicitly represent trade-offs between objectives. However, these policies are typically presented to the decision maker only through their value vectors, which can obscure substantial behavioral variation: policies that induce distinct trajectories may appear indistinguishable when evaluated solely by expected returns. We propose an exploratory diagnostic workflow that automatically highlights behavioral variation along the Pareto front that objective values alone do not reveal, providing both quantitative and visual tools to support policy inspection. We validate our approach on simple grid examples and scale it to continuous control benchmarks, demonstrating that it remains effective as problem complexity increases.

</details>


### [260] [Distinguishing indistinguishable attractors: Unsupervised anomaly detection with reservoir computers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21322)
*Davide Prosperino,Haochun Ma,Christoph Räth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于储层计算输出权重的Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验方法，用于检测非线性动力系统的状态变化，该方法对传统方法无法识别的微小变化高度敏感，并在多个基准测试中展现出优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性动力系统偏离正常状态（如心律失常、气候变化）的检测是跨学科难题，现有方法（经典非线性指标和深度学习检测器）对某些隐形变化不够敏感。

Method: 利用储层计算机（随机固定输入映射和储层）训练得到的输出权重作为系统表征，计算其经验累积分布函数，与训练数据构建的参考带进行KS检验，实现无监督在线检测。

Result: 成功区分两个视觉上无法区分的蝴蝶形吸引子；检测到的参数漂移比最强深度学习基线精确7倍；信噪比低至信号下方四个数量级时仍能标记异常；在临床心电图中识别出心室扑动。

Conclusion: 储层计算机的输出权重本身可作为学习系统的有效表示，而不仅仅是预测工具；该方法简单、高效、对微小扰动高度敏感，具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: Detecting when a nonlinear dynamical system departs from its normal regime is a recurring problem across the sciences, from cardiology to climate and energy systems. We show that a very simple Kolmogorov--Smirnov test on the output weights of a reservoir computer is highly sensitive to regime changes in nonlinear dynamical systems, including those invisible to both classical nonlinear measures and modern deep-learning detectors. The core idea of our algorithm is to treat the readout layer of a reservoir computer as a representation of the input dynamics. Since the input mapping and the reservoir itself are random and fixed, the trained output weights are the only object encoding the system at hand. We summarize this fingerprint by the empirical cumulative distribution function of the readout weights and compare it to a reference band built from the training data. This unsupervised, online detector distinguishes two visually indistinguishable butterfly-shaped attractors, resolves parameter drifts seven times smaller than the strongest deep-learning baseline, flags noise four orders of magnitude below the signal, and identifies ventricular flutter in a clinical ECG recording. More broadly, we aim to establish a perspective on reservoir computers in which the trained output weights are treated as a representation of the learned system in their own right, rather than merely as a means to forecasting.

</details>


### [261] [MedTS-TTT: Test-Time Training for Medical Time Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21329)
*Mingzhi Chen,Yiyu Gui,Guibo Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MedTS-TTT，一种针对医学时间序列的测试时训练框架，结合闭源自对齐和门控卷积骨干，无需迭代内循环优化即可实现快速样本自适应，在4个公开数据集上取得11/12的top-1排名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学时间序列存在显著的个体间分布偏移，导致固定参数模型泛化能力差。现有域适应方法依赖额外组件或目标批次统计，而多数TTT方法需要迭代内循环优化，增加测试开销。

Method: 基于CLSA-TTT（闭源自对齐测试时训练）和GCB（门控卷积骨干）。CLSA-TTT构建token级自监督目标，通过单步快速权重更新实现层内闭环对齐；GCB结合快速自适应与门控卷积分支，平衡局部动态建模和信息流控制。

Result: 在4个公开数据集（2个EEG、2个ECG）上，采用主题无关划分，MedTS-TTT在9个基线、3个指标的12项评估中取得11项top-1排名。

Conclusion: MedTS-TTT有效解决了医学时间序列的个体间分布偏移问题，无需迭代优化即可实现高效测试时自适应，在多个基准上取得领先性能。

Abstract: Medical time series (MedTS) signals such as electroencephalography (EEG) and electrocardiography (ECG) support many clinical applications. However, substantial subject-level heterogeneity often induces subject-level distribution shift, causing a fixed parameter set to generalize poorly to unseen individuals. Compared with domain adaptation methods that often depend on extra adaptation components or target-batch statistics, Test-Time Training (TTT) provides a more practical solution for sequential clinical data by enabling online adaptation from unlabeled test samples. However, many representative TTT methods require iterative inner-loop optimization, increasing test-time overhead. In this paper, we propose MedTS-TTT, a test-time training framework for medical time series modeling. MedTS-TTT is built upon Closed-Loop Self-Alignment Test-Time Training (CLSA-TTT) and a Gated Convolutional Backbone (GCB). CLSA-TTT constructs a token-level self-supervised target and performs a single-step fast-weight update for intra-layer closed-loop alignment, enabling rapid sample-wise adaptation without iterative inner-loop optimization. GCB combines CLSA-TTT-based fast adaptation and token-level fusion with a gated convolutional branch to balance local dynamic modeling and information-flow control. On 4 public datasets (2 EEG and 2 ECG) with subject-independent splits, MedTS-TTT achieves 11 top-1 rankings out of 12 evaluations across 9 baselines and 3 metrics. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/mingzhi-c/MedTS-TTT.

</details>


### [262] [Ramanujan Graph Rewiring with Non Negative Resistance Curvature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21333)
*Hugo Attali,Rachid El Jouhri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Ramanujan Propagation，一种利用Ramanujan图重连图结构的方法，以缓解GNN中的过度挤压问题，促进长距离信息流动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统GNN的消息传递机制中，指数级增长的邻域被压缩到固定维度嵌入，导致过度挤压问题，阻碍了长程依赖的有效学习。

Method: 利用Ramanujan图保证非负电阻曲率，设计一个图重连框架，在保留原始图局部连接性的同时构建Ramanujan重连图，从而缓解拓扑瓶颈。

Result: 所提方法在实验中优于9种最新的图重连技术。

Conclusion: Ramanujan图可作为可扩展、拓扑感知的GNN消息传递的严格结构先验。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for learning on graph-structured data by iteratively propagating and aggregating information across edges. However, conventional message passing schemes often suffer from over-squashing, whereby exponentially large neighborhoods are compressed into fixed-dimensional embeddings, impeding effective long-range dependency learning. In this work, we introduce Ramanujan Propagation, a graph rewiring strategy that leverages Ramanujan graphs to alleviate topological bottlenecks in GNNs. We first establish that suitably chosen Ramanujan graphs guarantee non-negative resistance curvature, which mitigates over-squashing and facilitates efficient information flow. We then propose an algorithmic framework to construct a Ramanujan rewired graph that preserves the local connectivity of the original graph. Our experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms nine state-of-the-art rewiring techniques. These results establish Ramanujan graphs as a rigorous structural prior for scalable, topology-aware message passing in GNNs.

</details>


### [263] [DataClaw0: Agentic Tailoring Multimodal Data from Raw Streams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21337)
*Cong Wan,Zeyu Guo,Zijian Cai,Jiangyang Li,SongLin Dong,Lin Peng,Xiangyang Luo,Zhiheng Ma,Yihong Gong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Agentic Data Tailoring的新范式，将数据处理提升为可学习的能力，通过两阶段流水线生成大规模数据集，并训练了DataClaw_0-9B模型，在视频生成、VQA和GUI导航等下游任务中验证了其高效的数据精炼能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模非结构化多模态数据存在高"数据熵"问题，阻碍了知识获取和AI后训练。现有的被动标注范式成本高、单调，且无法挖掘数据中的深层过程逻辑。

Method: 提出Agentic Data Tailoring范式，将数据处理提升为可学习的能力；设计两阶段流水线，基于确定性事实锚点生成大规模合成数据集；采用SFT+GRPO联合训练策略构建DataClaw_0-9B模型。

Result: 构建了首个数据精炼基准DataClaw_0-val，在视频生成、真实世界VQA和GUI导航等下游任务中，DataClaw_0能够生成高信息密度的精炼数据，在有限训练数据下实现高效模型适配。

Conclusion: 将数据处理从被动规则驱动转向主动可学习能力，为多模态数据高效利用提供了新路径，实验证明其在多种下游任务中均有效。

Abstract: Massive unstructured multimodal streams suffer from high "data entropy," impeding both efficient human knowledge acquisition and high-quality AI post-training. Existing passive annotation paradigms, heavily reliant on heuristic rules or general VLMs, are costly, monotonous, and fail to unlock the deep procedural logic embedded in raw data. We elevate data processing to a learnable capability, proposing a paradigm shift towards Agentic Data Tailoring, which actively refining and structuring data to align with diverse user and downstream intents. To overcome the data scarcity bottleneck in training such high-order capabilities, we design a two-stage pipeline grounding generative semantic synthesis in deterministic Factual Anchors, yielding a large-scale dataset spanning five core physical and digital domains. Building upon this, $\text{DataClaw}_0$-9B model synergizes Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), achieving robust alignment with complex refinement and tailoring intents. To systematically quantify this capability, we construct $\text{DataClaw}_0$-val, the first benchmark dedicated to data refinement. Crucially, we adopt downstream post-training as the ultimate validation touchstone. Evaluations on video generation, real-world VQA, and GUI navigation confirm that $\text{DataClaw}_0$ delivers high-information-density tailored data, facilitating efficient model adaptation to new tasks under limited training data regimes. Project page: https://czjdsg.github.io/MakeAnyData

</details>


### [264] [A Reward-Petri-Net Interpretation of Temporal Behavior Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21350)
*Till Schmeil,Günther Waxenegger-Wilfing,Sebastian Schirmer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将时间行为树（TBT）解释为奖励-佩特里网（RPN），用于强化学习中的奖励函数设计，通过自动分配奖励提升复杂机器人任务的学习效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂、长周期机器人任务的奖励函数设计非常困难，尤其是当任务具有层次结构和时间约束时。

Method: 将TBT（扩展了时序逻辑叶节点的行为树）翻译为佩特里网，并基于其结构自动分配奖励，形成奖励-佩特里网（RPN）。

Result: 在多个难度递增的环境中，基于TBT的奖励使得学习在普通RL失败时仍能成功，提高了样本效率，并提供了灵活直观的学习进度控制。

Conclusion: TBT翻译为RPN的方法能有效指导强化学习，不同奖励分配方案和TBT结构对学习效果有显著影响。

Abstract: This paper introduces an interpretation of Temporal Behavior Trees (TBTs) as Reward-Petri-Nets (RPNs) for reinforcement learning (RL). Designing reward functions for complex, long-horizon robotic tasks is notoriously difficult, especially when tasks have hierarchical structure and temporal constraints. TBTs extend conventional behavior trees (BTs) used in robotic applications by incorporating temporal properties into their leaf nodes. This allows TBTs to represents not only the behavioral task structure defined by BT operators such as Sequence, Fallback, and Parallel, but also the task's temporal constraints. In this work, the constraints are specified in the leaf nodes using Linear Temporal Logic. In order to inform RL rewards using TBTs, we provide a translation from TBT into a Petri Net (PN) and show how rewards can be automatically assigned based on the TBT's structure, resulting in a RPN. In a series of increasingly challenging environments, we demonstrate how TBT-based rewards enable learning where vanilla RL fails, improve sample efficiency, and offer flexible, intuitive control over the learning progress. We showcase the learning impact by using different reward distribution schemes and TBT structures.

</details>


### [265] [Urban Power Grid Topology and Hierarchy Identification from Open Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21352)
*Shiliang Zhang,Sabita Maharjan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于开放数据的城市电网拓扑识别框架，从高压输电到建筑连接层级完整重构电网结构，并在挪威奥斯陆Alna区成功应用于7330栋建筑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市电网的复杂拓扑和层级结构对能源预测、功率流管理和系统韧性分析至关重要，但详细的电网信息大多属于专有数据，严重阻碍了研究和创新，尤其是连接单个建筑的"最后一英里"配电网分析。

Method: 融合公共基础设施数据（电力线、变电站、变压器、电线杆），利用基于图的算法映射高中压骨架；再对OpenStreetMap建筑数据采用地理空间机器学习方法对电力需求集群进行分组，推断连接集群建筑的最终配电线物理拓扑。

Result: 在挪威奥斯陆Alna区成功重构了连接7330栋建筑及所有主要电力基础设施资产的完整电网拓扑。

Conclusion: 该框架为电力系统分析（如功率流优化、级联故障仿真、分布式可再生能源渗透下的电网韧性评估）提供了关键工具。

Abstract: Understanding the complex topology and hierarchy of urban power grid is crucial for energy prognosis, power flow management, and system resilience analysis. However, detailed grid information remains largely proprietary. This creates significant barriers for research and innovation, especially when analyzing the last-mile distribution networks connecting individual buildings. This paper addresses this challenge by developing an open-data-driven framework for the complete identification of urban power grid topology, from high-voltage transmission down to individual building connections. Particularly, we fuse public infrastructure data (power-lines, substations, transformers, poles) to map the high and medium-voltage skeleton using graph-based algorithms. We then leverage geospatial machine learning on OpenStreetMap building data to group power demand clusters, and infer the physical topology of the final distribution lines linking the clustered buildings. We apply the developed framework to the district of Alna in Oslo, Norway, and we reconstruct the complete grid topology that connects 7,330 buildings and all major electricity infrastructure assets. With the research in this work, we provide a critical tool that facilitates power system analysis, e.g., power flow optimization, cascading failure simulation, and grid resilience against the penetration of distributed renewable generation.

</details>


### [266] [SOHET: Sequence Of Heterogeneous Events Transformer with Self-Supervised Pre-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21356)
*Kees Jan de Vries,Mustafa Radha,Mathijs de Jong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SOHET架构，结合事件类型特定编码器与Transformer，用于异构事件流预测，在欺诈检测和EBES基准上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多机器学习应用依赖异构事件流进行预测，现有方法在处理多类型事件序列时效果有限。

Method: 提出SOHET（异构事件序列Transformer），采用层级架构结合事件类型特定的表格编码器、时间嵌入和类型嵌入，支持因果或双向Transformer处理，并引入三种自监督预训练目标。

Result: 在Booking.com大规模欺诈检测任务中，SOHET比FlexTPP、NAPPT和CIPPT提升5.8%，预训练额外提升2.6%并加快2.4%收敛速度；在EBES基准中，双向SOHET在8个任务中的6个达到或超越最佳结果。

Conclusion: SOHET能有效处理异构事件流，在因果和双向两种设定下均表现出色，预训练策略进一步提升了性能与训练效率。

Abstract: Many machine learning applications rely on heterogeneous event streams to make predictions, either causally as events arrive or bidirectionally over complete sequences. We propose SOHET (Sequence Of Heterogeneous Events Transformer), a hierarchical architecture combining event-type-specific tabular encoders with temporal and type embeddings, processed by a causal or bidirectional transformer. We introduce three self-supervised pre-training objectives for the causal setting. On a proprietary large-scale real-world Booking.com fraud detection task with 17 event types, SOHET outperforms FlexTPP, NAPPT, and CIPPT by 5.8%. Pre-training yields an additional 2.6% gain and 2.4% faster convergence. On the EBES benchmark, bidirectional SOHET matches or exceeds the published best on 6 out of 8 tasks.

</details>


### [267] [Predictive Repair Management Using a Multi-Head Attention Transformer and Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21364)
*Xinyao Zhang,Willie Cade,Karl R. Haapala,Arun Natarajan,Sara Behdad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于多头注意力网络的深度学习框架，用于准确预测维修时长。该框架结合嵌入技术和注意力机制处理分类数据，引入加权损失函数解决类别不平衡问题，并采用在线学习策略实现持续模型更新。在2013-2020年真实维修数据上达到78%的准确率，优于前馈神经网络和随机森林模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 维修时长准确预测对产品维护中的资源分配、客户满意度和运营绩效至关重要，但现有方法精度不足，难以处理大规模、类别不平衡且动态变化的维修数据。

Method: 采用多头注意力网络处理表格数据：通过嵌入和注意力机制整合分类特征与数值型历史数据；引入加权损失函数缓解类别不平衡；采用在线学习策略实现模型持续增量更新。

Result: 在2013-2020年真实汽车维修数据集上准确率达78%；多头注意力机制比前馈神经网络和随机森林更有效提取车辆标识与维修类型间的交互特征；在线学习策略提升了新数据的预测性能。

Conclusion: 多头注意力网络结合历史维护数据和在线学习策略能有效预测维修时长，注意力权重分析可揭示特征交互关系，为维修车间资源优化提供可靠支持。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of repair duration is an important challenge in product maintenance due to its implications for resource allocation, customer satisfaction, and operational performance. This study aims to develop a deep learning framework to help fleet repair shops accurately categorize repair time given product historical data. The study uses an automobile repair and maintenance dataset and creates an end-to-end predictive framework by employing a multi-head attention network designed for tabular data. The developed framework combines categorical information, transformed through embeddings and attention mechanisms, with numerical historical data to facilitate integration and learning from diverse data features. A weighted loss function is introduced to overcome class imbalance issues in large datasets. Moreover, an online learning strategy is used for continuous incremental model updates to maintain predictive accuracy in evolving operational environments. Our empirical findings demonstrate that the multi-head attention mechanism extracts meaningful interactions between vehicle identifiers and repair types compared to a feed-forward neural network and a random forest model. Also, combining historical maintenance data with an online learning strategy facilitates real-time adjustments to changing patterns and increases the model's predictive performance on new data. The model is tested on real-world repair data spanning 2013 to 2020 and achieves an accuracy of 78%, with attention weight analyses illustrating feature interactions.

</details>


### [268] [Enhancing Creativity in 3D Generative Design via a TRIZ-Inspired Text-to-CAD Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21378)
*Dongeon Lee,Leekyo Jeong,Soyoung Yoo,Sunwoong Yang,Namwoo Kang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种TRIZ启发的文本到CAD框架，利用大语言模型生成高质量、可编辑的3D CAD模型，同时系统性地探索创意设计替代方案。通过案例研究（椅子设计）验证，该方法在保持结构完整性的同时实现了4.0-14.7%的质量减轻。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于LLM的3D CAD生成方法主要关注几何精度和指令跟随性能，忽略了创意设计探索这一基本方面。

Method: 将TRIZ（发明问题解决理论）嵌入LLM提示策略中，通过设计生成、增强和优化三阶段流水线，系统性地应用TRIZ发明原理（如分割、反重量、动态和复合材料）生成创新CAD变体。

Result: 椅子设计案例中，所有增强设计实现了4.0-14.7%的质量减轻，同时保持结构完整性，生成了多个创意设计替代方案。

Conclusion: 将系统性创新方法论与基于LLM的3D CAD生成相结合，弥合了精度导向合成与创意导向探索之间的差距，推动了自主设计系统的发展。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in supporting engineering design tasks, including computer-aided design (CAD) automation. However, most existing LLM-based 3D CAD generation approaches primarily focus on geometric precision and instruction-following performance, often overlooking the fundamental aspect of creative design exploration. This study presents a TRIZ-inspired text-to-CAD framework that leverages LLMs to generate high-quality, editable CAD models while systematically exploring creative design alternatives. The framework integrates the Theory of Inventive Problem Solving (TRIZ)-embedding deep human insights from extensive patent records-into LLM prompting strategies, enabling autonomous generation of innovative CAD variants that address technical contradictions. Through a comprehensive three-stage pipeline of design generation, enhancement, and optimization, the framework produces structurally diverse CAD models from well-crafted prompts. The present study implements and evaluates the first two stages, while positioning the design optimization stage as future work. A product design case study (chair) demonstrates that the TRIZ-inspired text-to-CAD framework generates multiple creative design alternatives by systematically applying TRIZ inventive principles such as segmentation, anti-weight, dynamics, and composite materials, achieving 4.0-14.7% mass reduction across all enhanced designs while maintaining structural integrity. The key findings suggest that integrating systematic innovation methodologies with LLM-based 3D CAD generation bridges the gap between precision-focused synthesis and creativity-focused exploration, advancing toward autonomous design systems where AI makes design decisions independently, supporting human decision-making in human-AI collaborative design for engineering applications.

</details>


### [269] [Unsupervised Disentanglement Without Compromises : How Functional Orthogonality Enforces Identifiability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21385)
*Mathieu Cyrille Simon,Pascal Frossard,Christophe De Vleeschouwer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从函数视角探索无监督解耦表示学习，通过定义潜在概念为通过局部正交方向影响观测的因素，并证明这种正交性约束能使一般非线性生成模型可识别，无需统计独立性或因果假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战现有关于无监督解耦不可能性的论断，为无监督解耦表示学习提供原则性的替代理论基础。

Method: 从函数视角定义潜在概念，对生成映射的雅可比矩阵施加局部正交性约束，并利用正交正则化的归一化流进行实验验证。

Result: 正交性约束条件下非线性生成模型可识别，实验成功恢复真实因子，揭示了VAEs成功的原因。

Conclusion: 无需独立性或因果假设，仅需局部正交性约束即可实现无监督解耦，挑战了现有 impossibility 论断。

Abstract: This paper explores unsupervised disentangled representation learning from a functional perspective. We define latent concepts as factors that influence observations through locally orthogonal directions, formalized as an orthogonality constraint on the Jacobian of the generative mapping. We prove that this condition yields identifiability of general nonlinear generative models, without requiring statistical independence or causal assumptions, provided the latent domain admits all combinations of factor values. Experiments with orthogonality-regularized normalizing flows empirically confirm the theory, demonstrate reliable recovery of ground-truth factors, and shed light on the success of VAEs. These findings challenge the prevailing impossibility claims for unsupervised disentanglement and provide a principled alternative foundation.

</details>


### [270] [VLA-FAIL: Efficient Task Failure Detection for Finetuned Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21386)
*Florian Seligmann,Emiliyan Gospodinov,Enes Ulas Dincer,Gerhard Neumann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出VLA-FAIL框架，通过两种轻量级检测器（LLMD和ACC）实现视觉-语言-动作模型的运行时故障检测，无需故障数据且计算开销小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在分布外场景中行为不可预测，现有故障检测方法计算成本高、受限于架构假设或需要故障数据，亟需一种轻量且通用的检测方案。

Method: 1) LLMD：基于最后一层特征的马氏距离检测分布外状态；2) ACC：利用滚动时域控制下动作块的时间重叠性检测不一致性；3) AUCPDT：联合评估精度、召回率和检测延迟的阈值无关指标。

Result: 真实世界和仿真实验表明，LLMD和ACC捕获互补的故障模式，组合后能在多种任务中实现可靠且早期的故障检测，常优于显著更昂贵的基线方法。

Conclusion: VLA-FAIL是一种轻量、通用且有效的VLA故障检测框架，为VLA的安全部署提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Vision-language-action models (VLAs) achieve state-of-the-art performance on many robotic manipulation tasks, yet they can still behave unpredictably in out-of-distribution scenarios. Runtime failure detection is therefore essential for the safe real-world deployment of VLAs. However, existing task failure detectors require computationally expensive action sampling, are based on architectural assumptions that limit their applicability to VLAs, or need access to failure rollouts. We propose VLA-FAIL, a lightweight and broadly applicable failure detection framework for VLAs that combines two novel failure detectors with minimal overhead, without requiring failure data. The first, last-layer Mahalanobis distance (LLMD), detects out-of-distribution states by measuring token-wise deviations in last-layer features relative to the training data. The second, action chunk consistency (ACC), exploits the temporal overlap induced by receding-horizon control and detects failures when consecutive action chunks become inconsistent. To capture the trade-off between detection accuracy and detection latency, we introduce AUCPDT, a threshold-independent metric that jointly evaluates precision, recall, and detection time. Through extensive real-world and simulation experiments, we demonstrate that LLMD and ACC capture complementary failure modes whose combination enables reliable and early failure detection across diverse tasks, frequently outperforming significantly more expensive baseline methods.

</details>


### [271] [Atomistic Language Models Understand and Generate Materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21395)
*Sathya Edamadaka,Krithik Ramesh,Ju Li,Rafael Gómez-Bombarelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Atomistic Language Models (ALMs)，通过连续投影器和分阶段训练统一原子编码器、大语言模型和去噪扩散模型，实现从自然语言到晶体结构的生成与优化，并构建了首个文本条件晶体生成基准ALM Bench。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统语言模型与原子模型分离，要么将原子模型作为工具调用，要么在损失原子信息的文本编码上进行微调，缺乏真正的多模态能力。

Method: 通过连续投影器将预训练的原子编码器、大语言模型和去噪扩散模型统一，采用分阶段训练；提出Text-to-Crystal Feynman-Kac采样器在推理时强制执行化学计量约束。

Result: 在晶体结构预测和从头生成任务上达到了最先进的结果。

Conclusion: ALMs成功实现了语言与原子结构的原生多模态融合，为文本驱动的材料设计与优化提供了新范式。

Abstract: Atomistic structure and natural language have long been modeled separately, with language models either calling atomistic models as tools or being fine-tuned on lossy textual encodings that discard atomistic information. We introduce Atomistic Language Models (ALMs) to pursue native multimodality, in which a single language backbone understands atomistic structures, generates materials from natural language, and optimizes crystal structures as instructed by text. By unifying a pretrained atomistic encoder, large language model, and denoising diffusion model through purely continuous projectors and staged training, ALMs achieve state-of-the-art results on crystal structure prediction and de novo generation. ALMs are enabled by a continuous bridge that maps language model embeddings directly into the steering space of atomistic diffusion, and are assisted by Text-to-Crystal Feynman-Kac (T2C-FK), a particle-based sampler that scores partial denoising trajectories to enforce stoichiometric targets at inference time. To evaluate the ability of ALMs to optimize and generate materials from natural-language prompts and 3D atom-coordinate inputs, we introduce ALM Bench, the first benchmark for text-conditioned crystal generation and optimization. Code, training data, and model weights will be released soon.

</details>


### [272] [One Size does not Fit All: Heterogeneous Latent Space Alignment for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21415)
*Evangelia Koskinioti,Yi Shen,Georgios Stamou,Michael M. Zavlanos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为ADualVUOT的无监督域适应框架，通过双编码器VAE、连续归一化流、非平衡最优传输和对抗性增强来提升医学图像分割的跨域泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有域适应方法存在潜在表示表达能力有限、依赖手工静态增强等问题，限制了在医疗等高风险场景中的可靠部署。

Method: 1) 双编码器VAE结合连续归一化流增强后验表达；2) 采用非平衡最优传输（高斯-格罗莫夫-瓦瑟斯坦距离）进行域对齐；3) 引入对抗性增强方案合成最坏情况组合。

Result: 在医学影像基准测试上显著优于先前基于最优传输的方法。

Conclusion: 通过增强表示表达力和域对齐鲁棒性，有效提升了无监督域适应在医学图像分割中的性能。

Abstract: Domain shift remains a major obstacle to the reliable deployment of machine learning models in high-stakes environments such as healthcare. While Domain adaptation aims to mitigate these effects, existing approaches suffer from limited expressiveness of latent representations and a reliance on handcrafted, static augmentations. In this work, we address these limitations by proposing a novel deep learning architecture for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA), specifically optimized for medical image segmentation. Our framework, ADualVUOT, integrates a dual-encoder Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with Continuous Normalizing Flows (CNFs) to increase modeling flexibility and posterior expressiveness. To achieve domain alignment, we leverage Unbalanced Optimal Transport (UOT) through the Gaussian-Gromov-Wasserstein (GGW) distance, which handles structural and topological discrepancies between domains. Furthermore, we incorporate an adversarial augmentation scheme to synthesize worst-case compositions, thus enhancing model robustness. Extensive experiments on medical imaging benchmarks show significant gains over prior OT-based approaches.

</details>


### [273] [Federated Temporal Attention Intelligence for Cyber-Resilient IoMT: Lightweight Digital Twins and PPO-Driven Honeypot Deception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21422)
*Syed Zeeshan Haider,Anwar Shah,Muneeb Arif,Hamza Iftikhar,Waqas Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出LDT-FRL框架，结合轻量级数字孪生、联邦强化学习和注意力机制，在IoMT环境中实现高精度、隐私保护的威胁检测与防御，在多个基准数据集上达到99%以上的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: IoMT设备资源受限、延迟要求严格且数据隐私法规严苛，现有解决方案难以兼顾安全性、实时性与隐私保护，亟需轻量级且隐私保护的防御架构。

Method: 集成四个组件：1)基于GRU和时序自注意力的TAE分类器；2)基于LSTM的数字孪生生成异常分数；3)联邦PPO智能体选择ALLOW/ISOLATE/HONEYPOT_REDIRECT动作；4)智能蜜罐层将可疑流量转化为威胁情报。采用EMA平滑验证损失的FedAvg聚合策略应对非IID分布。

Result: CICDDoS 2019和TON-IoT上分别达99.66%和99.95%测试准确率，macro-F1分别为0.9913和0.9995，收敛速度比DTFL-CD基线快81%，MITM类达到完美F1=1.000。

Conclusion: LDT-FRL在IoMT安全防御中实现了高精度、快速收敛和可解释性，SHAP/LIME等分析验证了模型关注语义相关的流量特征，为每项防御决策提供可解释证据。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) devices introduces critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in healthcare environments where resource-constrained medical devices operate under strict latency requirements and stringent data-privacy regulations. To address these challenges, this paper presents the Lightweight Digital Twin and Federated Reinforcement Learning (LDT-FRL) framework, a privacy-preserving defense architecture integrating four complementary mechanisms: a Temporal Attention Encoder (TAE) built on a GRU backbone with learned temporal self-attention for flow-level threat classification; lightweight LSTM-based Digital Twins trained on normal-class traffic to generate per-device anomaly scores that gate the TAE classifier through a learned sigmoid coupling; a Federated Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent selecting among ALLOW, ISOLATE, and HONEYPOT_REDIRECT actions based on a seven-dimensional state; and an intelligent honeypot layer that converts redirected suspicious traffic into actionable threat intelligence. A federated aggregation strategy employing EMA-smoothed per-client validation losses as inverse-weighted FedAvg coefficients stabilizes global model updates under non-IID client distributions. Evaluated on CICDDoS 2019 and TON-IoT benchmarks, LDT-FRL achieves 99.66% and 99.95% test accuracy respectively, with macro-F1 scores of 0.9913 and 0.9995, converging 81% faster than the DTFL-CD baseline while attaining perfect F1=1.000 on the severely imbalanced MITM class. Explainability analysis via SHAP, LIME, Grad-CAM, and counterfactual methods confirms that the TAE focuses on semantically meaningful flow features, providing interpretable evidence for each defense decision.

</details>


### [274] [Dual-Attention Convolution Experts for Sparse Tensor Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21427)
*Yanlei Liu,Zhenyu Liao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为DCGC的神经张量分解方法，通过双注意力卷积专家网络和组级对比学习，有效解决高维稀疏数据补全中的跨模式交互捕捉困难和数据稀疏性问题，在交通和推荐任务中 outperforms 现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经张量分解方法难以捕捉复杂的跨模式交互，且对极端数据稀疏性脆弱。

Method: 提出DCGC方法：1）多通道卷积网络生成多样化的非线性对齐模式，并用门控双注意力机制聚焦重要输出通道和对齐特征；2）组级对比学习策略，聚合同反馈级别的正样本、分离不同级别的负样本，注入自监督信号缓解数据稀疏性。

Result: 在五个数据集上的实验表明，DCGC在稀疏张量补全任务中优于现有最先进方法，适用于交通和推荐应用。

Conclusion: DCGC通过双注意力卷积专家网络和组级对比学习有效提升了稀疏张量补全性能，代码已开源。

Abstract: Tensor factorization (TF) has been widely adopted for high-dimensional sparse data completion tasks. Despite significant progress, neural TF methods often struggle to capture complex cross-mode interactions and remain vulnerable to (extreme) data sparsity. To address these challenges, we propose a novel neural tensor factorization approach, termed Dual-Attention Convolution Expert Networks with Group-Level Contrastive Learning (DCGC). For the first problem, DCGC generates diverse non-linear alignment patterns of latent factors via a multi-channel convolution network, and leverages the gated dual-attention mechanism to drive the model to focus on more important output channels (i.e., convolution experts) and the aligned features. Furthermore, DCGC introduces a group-level contrastive learning strategy that aggregates positive samples with identical feedback levels while separating negative samples across different levels. This strategy injects high-quality self-supervised signals to mitigate data sparsity. Extensive experiments conducted on five datasets demonstrate that our DCGC outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in sparse tensor completion for traffic and recommendation applications. Code to reproduce the experimental results in the paper is available at https://github.com/ku1z/DCGC.

</details>


### [275] [Universal Encoders for Modular Relational Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21434)
*Jakub Peleška,Gustav Šír*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种模块化的关系深度学习框架，通过解耦行编码和图消息传递，引入通用行编码器（Universal Row Encoder），基于Transformer架构整合原始单元格数据与模式元数据，实现跨数据库的知识迁移和性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关系深度学习方法存在泛化障碍：要么是模式特定的（每个新数据库需从头训练），要么采用单一架构将特征编码与图消息传递纠缠在一起，导致跨数据库泛化能力差。

Method: 提出模块化方法，将行编码与图消息传递解耦。核心是Universal Row Encoder——基于Transformer的模块，整合原始单元格数据、模式元数据（列语义、表名、全局分布统计），通过行内自注意力机制实现上下文感知，生成表宽度不变的通用行嵌入。

Result: 在RelBench基准测试上，预训练编码器增强了跨数据库知识迁移，同时改善了学习收敛速度和内存占用。

Conclusion: 通过解耦编码与消息传递、引入通用行编码器，有效解决了RDL的泛化问题，为构建基础关系模型提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Relational Deep Learning (RDL) models multi-tabular databases as temporal heterogeneous graphs for end-to-end representation learning. While RDL is evolving rapidly, existing approaches face significant generalization obstacles. They are either schema-specific, requiring training from scratch for every new database, or they rely on monolithic architectures that entangle feature encoding with graph message-passing. Analyzing these limitations, we establish four core pillars for building foundational relational models: semantic granularity, structural topology, temporal causality, and unified optimization.
  Addressing these pillars, we propose a modular approach that decouples row encoding from graph message-passing. We introduce the Universal Row Encoder, a transformer-based module that integrates raw cell data with schema metadata$-$including column semantics, table names, and global distribution statistics$-$to produce table-width invariant row embeddings. By explicitly feeding global statistics to an intra-row self-attention mechanism, the encoder natively contextualizes unseen features and handles sparse data. Serving as a flexible "backend" for any downstream graph architecture, our pretrained encoder enhances cross-database knowledge transfer on the established RelBench benchmarks while improving learning convergence and memory footprint.

</details>


### [276] [Fusing Backdoors, Machine Learning, and Optimization for Large-Scale Parametric Mixed-Integer Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21440)
*El Mehdi Er Raqabi,Pascal Van Hentenryck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BIPC框架，通过识别并预测优化问题中的"后门"变量（即影响计算复杂度的关键变量子集），结合监督学习和优化技术，大幅加速大规模混合整数问题的求解速度，同时保持解的高质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模优化问题在电力系统、交通、供应链等场景中需要反复求解，尽管问题结构固定但参数频繁变化，导致巨大计算开销。现有方法难以在保证解质量的同时显著加速求解过程。

Method: BIPC框架包含三个阶段：第一阶段识别后门变量；第二阶段使用监督学习模型预测后门变量的值（有界域变量预测具体值，宽域变量预测区间）；第三阶段将预测结果作为约束构建缩减优化问题并求解，必要时进行校正步骤恢复可行性或最优性保证。

Result: 在实际大规模问题上，该方法大幅缩短了求解时间，同时仅损失有限的解质量。

Conclusion: BIPC框架能够在参数频繁扰动（如突发事件、需求波动、运营变化）的情况下，快速提供高质量可行解，为将机器学习集成到现有优化流程提供了实用途径。

Abstract: Large-scale optimization problems are often solved repeatedly under similar structural conditions, leading to substantial computational overhead. This occurs in applications such as power systems, transportation, and supply chain networks, where the underlying structure is fixed while parameters frequently vary under perturbations.
  This paper proposes a Learning to Optimize (LTO) framework that accelerates the solution of large-scale general mixed-integer problems by leveraging the concept of a backdoor, i.e., a subset of variables that drive most of the computational complexity. The proposed BIPC framework consists of three phases. Phase I is an identification procedure that discovers a backdoor for a set of instances in the distribution. Phase II uses supervised learning to develop machine learning models that, given an instance, predict values for bounded-domain backdoor variables and intervals for wide-domain backdoor variables. These predictions define a reduced optimization problem where the predictions constrain the backdoor variables, while the other variables remain free. Phase III optimizes this reduced problem and, if necessary, applies a correction step to restore feasibility or the optimality guarantees.
  Experiments on real-world, large-scale problems show substantial reductions in solution time with only a limited loss in solution quality. The framework enables organizations to solve large-scale optimization problems efficiently in the presence of frequent perturbations, such as unexpected events, demand fluctuations, or operational changes. Because these changes affect parameters rather than the problem structure, BIPC can quickly provide high-quality, feasible solutions, offering a practical approach to integrating machine learning into existing optimization pipelines.

</details>


### [277] [Fast-TurboQuant: A Multiplier-Free Online Vector Quantization Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21448)
*Pedro M. R. Pereira,Felipe A. P. de Figueiredo,Rausley A. A. de Souza*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Fast-TurboQuant 提出了一种无需乘法的投影架构，用快速沃尔什-哈达玛变换（FWHT）替代密集随机旋转矩阵，在保持1-bit量化质量的同时，实现了19.7倍的算法加速，并降低了均方误差、提升了Recall@10。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型扩展时，键值缓存和检索增强生成系统的内存带宽成为关键瓶颈。虽然1-bit量化可以缓解这一问题，但TurboQuant依赖密集随机旋转矩阵进行投影，每次嵌入需要数百万次浮点乘法运算，难以在资源受限的边缘芯片上部署。

Method: 提出Fast-TurboQuant，使用结构化快速Johnson-Lindenstrauss变换替代密集矩阵：先进行Rademacher相位反转，再应用快速沃尔什-哈达玛变换（FWHT）。该方法利用次高斯浓度满足标量Lloyd-Max量化的前置条件，将算术复杂度降至仅加法运算，消除了硬件乘法器。

Result: 在DBpedia OpenAI-3 Large嵌入数据集上，顺序执行下实现了19.7倍的算法加速；FWHT的零填充维度扩展还降低了均方误差，并提升了Recall@10指标。

Conclusion: Fast-TurboQuant通过无乘法的结构化变换，在保持量化性能的同时大幅降低了计算复杂度和硬件需求，更适合在边缘设备上部署。

Abstract: As large language models scale, memory bandwidth for key-value caches and retrieval-augmented generation systems becomes a critical bottleneck. While 1-bit quantization addresses this constraint, recent TurboQuant relies on dense random rotation matrices to condition the vector distribution before quantization. This projection demands millions of floating-point multiplications per embedding, making it difficult to deploy on constrained edge silicon. We introduce Fast-TurboQuant, a multiplier-free projection architecture that replaces the dense matrix with a structured fast Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform. By applying a Rademacher phase inversion followed by a fast Walsh-Hadamard transform (FWHT), the method leverages sub-Gaussian concentration to satisfy the prerequisites of scalar Lloyd-Max quantization without Gaussian projections. This substitution reduces the arithmetic complexity to only additions, eliminating hardware multipliers. Evaluation on DBpedia OpenAI-3 Large embeddings demonstrates a 19.7 times algorithmic speedup under sequential execution. Furthermore, the dimension expansion due to the FWHT zero-padding reduces the mean squared error and improves Recall@10.

</details>


### [278] [Post-Training Speech Enhancement Language Models with Perceptual Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21458)
*Frédéric Berdoz,Luca A. Lanzendörfer,Antonis Asonitis,Roger Wattenhofer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于组序列策略优化(GSPO)的后训练方法，利用多指标感知奖励直接优化语音增强语言模型，在DNS2020基准上达到SOTA，并证明多奖励优化优于单指标变体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音增强语言模型依赖离散音频令牌和token级交叉熵优化，与评估时使用的感知指标不匹配，存在优化目标与评估标准不一致的问题。

Method: 采用组序列策略优化(GSPO)结合多指标感知奖励(DNSMOS、WER、UTMOS)作为奖励信号，直接优化非可微的质量指标，无需学习代理或离线偏好对。

Result: 在UniSE和GenSE两个自回归基模型上应用，在DNS2020基准上取得SOTA结果；人类评估消融实验表明复合多指标奖励优于任何单指标变体。

Conclusion: 多奖励优化能避免单指标训练中的奖励破解问题，证明联合优化多个感知指标是更有效的语音增强训练策略。

Abstract: Speech enhancement language models achieve strong results when trained on discrete audio tokens, but their optimization relies on token-level cross-entropy rather than the perceptual metrics used for evaluation. We introduce a post-training stage for autoregressive speech enhancement language models using Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) with multi-metric perceptual rewards. Our method directly optimizes non-differentiable quality metrics (DNSMOS, WER, and UTMOS) as reward signals, without learned surrogates or offline preference pairs. Applied to two autoregressive base models, UniSE and GenSE, our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on the DNS2020 benchmark. A human evaluation ablation further shows that the composite multi-metric reward is preferred over any single-metric variant, confirming that multi-reward optimization avoids the reward hacking observed with single-metric training.

</details>


### [279] [Deep Learning for Soil Moisture Estimation: Fusing Satellite Data with Optimally-Lagged Meteorological Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21475)
*Adrian Canovas-Rodriguez,Aurora González Vidal,Antonio F. Skarmeta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出基于交叉相关函数（CCF）的最优时滞分析方法，结合CNN、LSTM及CNN-LSTM混合深度学习架构，融合遥感、气象和土壤深度数据，显著提升了半干旱农业区土壤湿度估算精度，最高R²达0.930。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半干旱农业区土壤湿度估算需要融合遥感与气象信息，同时必须考虑土壤湿度对大气强迫的延迟响应特性，现有方法对此建模不足。

Method: 提出CCF方法确定气象变量与土壤湿度间的最优时滞（0-30天）及垂直传播时滞（0-15天）；设计三种深度学习架构（CNN、LSTM、CNN-LSTM混合），在五种特征配置下进行评估，特征从仅卫星数据逐步融合到卫星-气象-深度全融合。

Result: 气象变量优于仅卫星基线；深度信息对三种架构均至关重要；单像素CNN取得最佳单图结果（R²=0.877, RMSE=2.28），七图平均R²=0.535（较基线+1.00）；CNN-LSTM混合模型取得最高整体性能（R²=0.930, CVRMSE=8.0%）。

Conclusion: 显式建模大气延迟和垂直地下延迟可显著改善精准农业中的土壤湿度估算。

Abstract: Accurate soil moisture estimation in semi-arid agricultural regions requires integrating remote sensing and meteorological information while accounting for the delayed response of soil moisture to atmospheric forcing. This study introduces a Cross-Correlation Function (CCF) methodology to determine optimal temporal lags (0-30 days) between meteorological variables and soil moisture, as well as inter-depth lags (0-15 days) describing vertical moisture propagation from the surface (10 cm) to deeper layers (20-50 cm). The approach was validated across seven agricultural plots in southeastern Spain. Three deep learning architectures, each targeting a distinct prediction granularity, were evaluated under five feature configurations ranging from satellite-only to full satellite-meteorology-depth fusion: a CNN for per-pixel estimation within each plot, an LSTM for frame-level (daily plot-mean) prediction, and a CNN-LSTM hybrid operating on sliding windows with pooled multi-patch training. Models were assessed on held-out data to measure genuine generalisation. Meteorological variables improved performance over the satellite-only baseline, while subsurface depth information proved decisive across all architectures. The per-pixel CNN achieved the strongest single-patch result (R^2 = 0.877, RMSE = 2.28), with a seven-patch average R^2 of 0.535, representing an improvement of +1.00 over the satellite-only baseline. The pooled CNN-LSTM hybrid obtained the highest overall performance (R^2 = 0.930, CVRMSE = 8.0%). These results demonstrate that explicitly modelling atmospheric and vertical subsurface delays substantially improves soil moisture estimation for precision agriculture.

</details>


### [280] [Robustness Cannot be Reduced to Regularization: Studying Adversarial Training Beyond the Linear Case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21488)
*David A. R. Robin,Rafael Pinot,Yann Chevaleyre*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了对于两层神经网络，对抗性风险与任何简单正则化风险之间不存在形式等价性，并通过实验表明这种不可能性在更深层架构中仍然存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对抗训练是防御对抗样本的有效方法，但其计算成本高昂。在线性模型中，对抗性风险与正则化风险之间存在形式等价性，从而实现了更高效的训练。研究者希望探究这种等价性是否可以扩展到更复杂的非线性模型。

Method: 通过理论归约证明两层网络中对抗性风险与简单正则化风险之间不存在等价性，并通过Wide-ResNets上的实验提供更深层架构的经验证据。

Result: 严格证明了两层网络中不存在对抗性风险与简单正则化风险之间的等价关系，并在Wide-ResNets上观察到同样的不可能性。

Conclusion: 对抗性风险与简单正则化风险之间的形式等价性无法从线性模型扩展到非线性模型，这表明高效对抗训练方法需要寻找新的方向。

Abstract: The vulnerability of ML models to adversarial examples has recently emerged as a major concern. While adversarial training is one of the most effective countermeasures to this issue, its high computational cost remains an obstacle to practical deployment. Recent progress in reducing this cost has relied, in the case of linear models, on a formal equivalence between the adversarial risk and a simpler form of regularized risk. This enabled significantly more efficient training procedures, which naturally raises the question of whether such an equivalence can be extended beyond linear models. In this work, we formally show that no such equivalence is possible for two-layer networks. Our proofs proceed via a reduction to key properties that fundamentally separate the adversarial risk from any simple regularized risk which would only exhibit a weak form of data dependence. Beyond this setting, we provide empirical evidence on Wide-ResNets indicating that the same type of impossibility persists in deeper and more expressive architectures.

</details>


### [281] [Predicting High-Risk Colorectal Polyps in African Americans Using Pre-Colonoscopy Clinical Features: Machine Learning Model Development and Temporal Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21492)
*Basheer Qolomany,Mrinalini Deverapall,Adeyinka Laiyemo,Zaki Sherif,Mori Yuichi,Omer Ahmed,Hassan Brim,Hassan Ashktorab*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用非侵入性（结肠镜前）的人口学、临床和行为特征，开发并外部验证了多种机器学习模型，用于预测高危结直肠息肉，数据集来自以非裔美国人为主的多样化城市队列（共6243名患者）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的结直肠息肉风险分层依赖结肠镜和病理结果，但非侵入性、结肠镜前的特征可能帮助识别高风险患者，优化内镜资源分配，尤其在资源有限的地区，并促进更公平的风险分层可及性。

Method: 回顾性队列研究，使用霍华德大学医院2015-2022年4681名患者（内部验证）和2023-2024年1562名患者（外部验证）的数据，开发并验证了神经网络、随机森林、SVM、朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归、决策树、KNN和XGBoost等模型。高危息肉定义为绒毛状/管状绒毛状腺瘤、高度不典型增生、息肉≥10mm或≥3个息肉。

Result: 开发了多种机器学习模型，并在内部和外部验证集上评估了预测高危结直肠息肉的性能。（摘要中未提供具体数值结果）

Conclusion: 使用非侵入性、结肠镜前的特征进行机器学习预测，有望在资源有限的环境中优化结肠镜资源分配，并在多样化人群中促进更公平的风险分层。

Abstract: Risk stratification for advanced colorectal polyps typically relies on colonoscopy and/or pathology findings. However, there is growing interest in whether non-invasive features available prior to colonoscopy can help identify patients at higher risk. Such approaches may enhance clinical decision-making by prioritizing surveillance for individuals most likely to harbor high-risk polyps, when colonoscopy resources are limited while potentially reducing unnecessary procedures in lower-risk patients. Importantly, the use of non-invasive, pre-procedural information may also help promote more equitable access to risk stratification, particularly in settings where colonoscopy resources are limited or unevenly distributed. We aimed to develop and externally validate machine learning models to predict high-risk colorectal polyps using only non-invasive, pre-colonoscopy demographic, clinical, and behavioral features in a diverse, predominantly African American, urban cohort.
  We conducted a retrospective cohort study using demographic, lifestyle, and comorbidity data from patients who underwent colonoscopy at Howard University Hospital to develop and validate several machine learning models, including neural networks, random forest, support vector machines (SVM), Naive Bayes, logistic regression, decision trees, k-nearest neighbors (KNN), and XGBoost, for predicting high-risk colorectal polyps. High-risk polyps (HRP) were defined as villous or tubullovillous adenomas, high-grade dysplasia, polyps >= 10 mm in size, and/or the presence of >= 3 polyps per procedure; all other cases were classified as low-risk polyps (LRP). The dataset included 4,681 patients from 2015-2022 used for internal validation and 1,562 patients from 2023-2024 used for external validation.

</details>


### [282] [Breaking chains with trees: Deep learning with $\mathcal{O}(\log N)$ parallel time complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21497)
*Neeraj Mohan Sushma,Aditya Nagarsekar,Cabrel Teguemne Fokam,Robin Schiewer,Amit Kumar Pal,Anand Subramoney,David Kappel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出分层块局部学习（HBLL），通过变分原理的局部学习目标分解深度网络为分层块，实现O(log N)并行训练复杂度，消除端到端反向传播限制，在视觉和语言任务上取得竞争性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反向传播存在锁定问题（层间更新严格依赖，无法并行）和权重传输问题（需要对称的前向和反向通路），限制了并行性、增加了内存和通信开销，对可扩展学习构成挑战。

Method: 将深度神经网络分解为分层链接的块，每个块使用基于变分原理的局部学习目标独立训练，消除全端到端反向传播，同时保持跨网络的有效信息传播。

Result: 首次实现深度神经网络O(log N)并行时间复杂度的训练（N为层数），在视觉和语言建模任务上取得竞争性能，并扩展到循环序列架构。

Conclusion: HBLL有效解决了反向传播的锁定和权重传输问题，实现了高度并行化训练，同时保持网络性能，为大规模可扩展深度学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Modern deep neural network architectures are trained via backpropagation, which requires errors to be sequentially propagated through all layers before parameters can be updated. This introduces two limitations: locking, where layer-wise updates are strictly interdependent and cannot proceed in parallel, and the weight transport problem, which requires symmetric forward and backward pathways for exact gradient computation. These constraints restrict parallelism, increase memory and communication overhead, and pose challenges for scalable learning. In this work, we propose Hierarchical Block-Local Learning (HBLL), a framework that decomposes deep neural networks into hierarchically linked blocks trained using local learning objectives derived from variational principles, eliminating the need for full end-to-end backpropagation while maintaining effective information propagation across the network. HBLL is the first algorithm that is able to train deep neural networks in $\mathcal{O}(\log N)$ parallel time complexity, where $N$ is the number of network layers. We show that HBLL implicitly defines a family of subnetworks corresponding to different hierarchical paths, enabling flexible inference with different effective numbers of layers. We evaluate HBLL on a set of challenging vision and language modeling tasks, achieving competitive performance. We also extend HBLL to recurrent sequence architectures, applying to settings that otherwise rely on backpropagation through time.

</details>


### [283] [Privacy-Preserving Federated Temporal Graph Learning with Digital Twin--Guided Adaptive Deception for Cyber-Resilient IoMT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21513)
*Syed Zeeshan Haider,Anwar Shah,Muneeb Arif,Hamza Iftikhar,Waqas Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出联邦时序图卷积网络结合优势演员-评论家（Federated TGCN-A2C）架构，在保护隐私的前提下实现对IoT/IoMT网络威胁的实时检测与响应，在CICDDoS 2019和TON-IoT数据集上分别达到99.48%和99.61%的测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物联网和医疗物联网设备资源受限，面临严峻的网络安全漏洞，同时需满足严格的延迟和数据隐私法规，现有方法难以兼顾隐私保护、实时检测和高精度分类。

Method: 集成四种机制：PyG时序GCN（GCNConv+全局平均池化+异常门）进行流级分类；LSTM数字孪生生成设备级异常分数门控分类器；联邦A2C智能体选择ALLOW/ISOLATE/HONEYPOT-REDIRECT动作；增强蜜罐层将可疑流量转化为威胁情报。联邦聚合采用EMA平滑验证损失作为逆加权FedAvg系数，余弦退火学习率。

Result: CICDDoS 2019上准确率99.48%，加权F1 0.9948，25轮收敛；TON-IoT上准确率99.61%，加权F1 0.9961，10轮收敛。所有类别F1均超过0.9237（CICDDoS 16类）和0.9488（TON-IoT 10类，含严重不平衡的MITM）。优于Fed-Inforce-Fusion 0.21个百分点，覆盖额外3个攻击类别。

Conclusion: 结合SHAP、LIME、Grad-CAM及反事实分析等可解释性方法，验证了决策基于语义有意义的流量特征，支持临床部署中的监管问责。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of IoT and IoMT devices introduces critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in healthcare and industrial environments where resource-constrained devices operate under strict latency and data-privacy regulations. This paper presents the Federated Temporal Graph Convolutional Network with Advantage Actor-Critic (Federated TGCN-A2C), a privacy-preserving defense architecture integrating four mechanisms: a PyG-based Temporal GCN using GCNConv layers with global mean pooling and a learned anomaly gate for flow-level threat classification; LSTM-based Digital Twins generating per-device anomaly scores gating the classifier via learned sigmoid coupling; a Federated A2C agent selecting among ALLOW, ISOLATE, and HONEYPOT-REDIRECT actions based on a seven-dimensional state capturing confidence, entropy, anomaly magnitude, and traffic composition; and an enhanced honeypot layer converting suspicious traffic into threat intelligence with adaptive thresholds. Federated aggregation employs EMA-smoothed per-client validation losses as inverse-weighted FedAvg coefficients to stabilize global model updates under non-IID distributions, with cosine-annealed learning rates per round. Evaluated on CICDDoS 2019 and TON-IoT benchmarks, the framework achieves 99.48% and 99.61% test accuracy with weighted-F1 scores of 0.9948 and 0.9961, converging within 25 and 10 federated rounds, outperforming Fed-Inforce-Fusion by 0.21 percentage points while covering three additional attack categories. All sixteen CICDDoS 2019 classes achieve F1 of at least 0.9237 and all ten TON-IoT classes achieve F1 of at least 0.9488, including the severely imbalanced MITM category. Post-hoc explainability via SHAP, LIME, Grad-CAM, and counterfactual analysis confirms decisions are grounded in semantically meaningful flow features, supporting regulatory accountability in clinical deployments.

</details>


### [284] [Towards Understanding the Power and Limits of the Muon Optimizer: A River-Valley Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21514)
*Tianqi Shen,Jinji Yang,Runze Shi,Jianhao Ma,Jiaye Teng,Ziye Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个轨迹层面的理论来刻画Muon优化器在LLM训练中的优势和局限，发现Muon在早期优化中沿信息方向移动更快，但在目标解附近收敛更慢且易振荡，从而建议在最后阶段切换为GD类优化器而非仅依赖固定学习率调度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Muon优化器因谱归一化和改进条件数在理论上具有吸引力，但在LLM训练中其性能提升不稳定、对调度敏感，且并非一致优于Adam/AdamW，存在理论与实证之间的差距。

Method: 提出混合尖峰矩阵感知模型，将感知算子分解为信号、尖峰和体成分；采用河-谷视角将优化景观分为河流方向（通往解）和山丘方向（噪声信息）；在无动量和有动量设置下分别分析Muon的收敛行为。

Result: 无动量下Muon沿信息河流方向移动更快，但近河底收敛慢于GD；有动量时Muon正交化更新去除残差尺度信息，导致在目标解附近易过冲和振荡。

Conclusion: 建议在最终阶段从Muon切换为GD类精炼优化器，而非仅依赖固定学习率调度；在语言模型训练实验中提供了初步验证。

Abstract: Recently, Muon has gained substantial attention as an appealing alternative to Adam-like optimizers, with many works highlighting its advantages through spectral normalization and improved conditioning. Yet this positive theoretical narrative contrasts with its empirical performance in large language model (LLM) training, where Muon's gains over Adam/AdamW are often mixed, schedule-sensitive, and not uniformly superior. To address this gap, we develop a trajectory-level theory characterizing both the strengths and limitations of Muon. We introduce a mixed-spiked matrix sensing model whose sensing operator decomposes into signal, spike, and bulk components, capturing a mixture of anisotropic structure and long-tail information reminiscent of LLM training. On top of it, we adopted a river-valley perspective in which we view the landscape as composed of a river direction flowing to the desired solution and hill directions encoding nuisance or task-irrelevant information. In the momentum-free setting, we show that Muon moves faster along the information-bearing river direction during early optimization, but can converge much more slowly near the river bottom than gradient descent. We then extend the river-valley perspective to general nonconvex objectives with momentum by studying points on the spectral river. There, while Muon converges faster early on, its orthogonalized update removes residual scale information, making it prone to overshooting and oscillation near the target solution. Together, these results suggest that our characterizations extend beyond spiked matrix sensing and motivate switching to GD-like refinement optimizers in the final phase, rather than relying only on a fixed learning-rate schedule for Muon. We also provide preliminary evidence supporting this two-stage approach in language model training experiments.

</details>


### [285] [Backpropagating Through Simulation: Analytic Policy Gradients for Sample and Learning Efficient Differentiable Continuous Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21525)
*Yueci Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Analytic Policy Gradients (APG)，一种利用可微环境动力学通过反向传播精确计算策略梯度的方法，在四个连续控制任务上与 PPO 对比，采用分段反向传播和自举策略应对长时域梯度退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无模型强化学习（如 PPO）需要大量交互且依赖高方差优势估计，而环境动力学可微时，回报是策略参数的可微函数，可通过反向传播精确计算梯度，提升样本效率。

Method: 提出 Analytic Policy Gradients (APG)，通过反向传播可微仿真计算精确策略梯度；设计分段反向传播方案（含 MC 和 critic 自举模式）缓解长时域梯度退化；在多轴评估协议下对比 PPO，控制模型架构、归一化和优化器一致。

Result: 在点质量目标到达、2D 点质量避障导航、2D T 形块推动和 7-DOF Franka FR3 末端执行器到达等四个连续控制任务上，APG 与 PPO 进行了系统对比，并报告了分段长度和自举策略的消融实验结果。

Conclusion: APG 利用可微环境动力学提供了一种更高效的策略梯度计算方法，分段反向传播和自举策略有效缓解了长时域任务中的梯度退化问题。

Abstract: Model-free reinforcement learning algorithms such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) treat the environment as a black box, estimating policy gradients from sampled rewards; this process demands millions of interactions and relies on high-variance advantage estimates. When environment dynamics are differentiable, the return is an end-to-end differentiable function of the policy parameters, enabling exact gradient computation via backpropagation through simulation. We term this approach Analytic Policy Gradients (APG) and evaluate it against PPO on four continuous control tasks of increasing dynamical complexity: a one-dimensional point-mass target-reaching task, a 2D point-mass navigation task with obstacle avoidance, a 2D rigid-body T-block pushing task, and a 7-DOF Franka FR3 end-effector reaching task. Both algorithms share identical model architectures, observation normalization, and optimizer settings. To decouple sample efficiency from compute efficiency, we design a multi-axis evaluation protocol that records performance against environment steps and gradient steps. We report a segmented backpropagation scheme with MC and critic-based bootstrap modes that mitigates gradient degradation on long-horizon tasks, and present ablations over segment length and bootstrap strategy.

</details>


### [286] [Memory Is No Longer a Bottleneck: Memory-Efficient Graph Filtering for Scalable Collaborative Filtering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21540)
*Jin-Duk Park,Won-Yong Shin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于Krylov子空间的高效内存图滤波协同过滤方法（Mem-GF），在不显式存储物品相似度图的情况下实现多项式图滤波，内存占用降低5.74倍，速度提升4.38倍，且推荐准确度超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于图滤波（GF）的协同过滤方法虽然避免了繁重的模型训练，但需要存储完整的物品相似度图，导致大规模数据集下内存开销巨大，限制了实际应用。

Method: 利用Krylov子空间结构近似多项式图滤波器，无需显式存储物品相似度图；理论分析了保证无损近似的最小Krylov子空间大小。

Result: 内存占用降低5.74倍，运行速度提升4.38倍，推荐准确度持续超越SOTA的GF和GCN方法，可扩展到数千万交互规模的数据集。

Conclusion: Mem-GF是一种兼顾理论严谨性与实际可用性的高效协同过滤解决方案，有效解决了GF方法的内存瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have demonstrated significant success in capturing complex user-item relationships for collaborative filtering (CF). However, due to their reliance on extensive model training, training-free graph filtering (GF)-based CF methods have emerged as a promising alternative, offering computational efficiency by smoothing graph signals via matrix operations. In particular, polynomial GF-based approaches demonstrate improved accuracy through their ability to design more expressive and flexible filtering functions. Despite these advantages, existing GF methods suffer from a critical memory bottleneck: they necessitate storing the full item similarity graph, incurring prohibitive memory costs for large-scale datasets, which limits their practical applicability. To tackle this challenge, we propose Mem-GF (Memory-efficient GF), a new GF-based CF method that departs from conventional designs by principally leveraging the structure of Krylov subspaces as a core mechanism for approximating polynomial graph filters without explicitly storing the item similarity graph. We theoretically analyze the minimum Krylov subspace size that guarantees lossless approximation. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that Mem-GF achieves up to 5.74$\times$ lower memory usage and 4.38$\times$ speedup in runtime, while consistently exceeding the recommendation accuracy of state-of-the-art GF and GCN-based methods. Mem-GF robustly scales to datasets with tens of millions of interactions, establishing itself as a practically viable and theoretically grounded solution for efficient CF.

</details>


### [287] [LIG: Layer-wise Integrated Gradients for Within-Layer Flow Analysis in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21564)
*Eight Suzuki,Hideitsu Hino,Noboru Murata*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出LIG（逐层积分梯度）方法，将积分梯度扩展到集合到集合的映射，用于分析Transformer内部计算，在不需重训练的情况下以模块边界粒度解释信息流动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer性能强大但内部计算不透明，现有解释方法难以在模块边界粒度上有效分析信息流动。

Method: 将每层Transformer视为动态图，在非线性模块边界（ATT和MLP）应用集合到集合的积分梯度，通过L2标量化解扩展到集合映射，并结合逐层相关性传播的思想实现层内贡献组合。

Result: 在BERT-base和PTB上，最佳配置是目标token嵌入作为ATT基线，ATT输出（a=0）或零作为MLP基线，能最好地保持层内一致性。

Conclusion: LIG可作为模块边界粒度的诊断性XAI工具，无需模型特定重训练或逐操作解释器设计。

Abstract: Transformers achieve strong performance, but their internal computations remain opaque. We view each Transformer layer as a dynamic graph whose nodes are token representations and per-head attention outputs, with Multi-Head Attention (ATT) and MLP as module boundaries. On this graph we use LIG (Layer-wise Integrated Gradients), which applies set-to-set Integrated Gradients (IG) at nonlinear module boundaries. Set-to-set IG applies IG to a map from a set of input token representations to a set of output representations, evaluating token-to-token contributions, which is not standard in prior IG applications. This extends IG from the usual scalar-objective setting to set-to-set maps via an L2 scalarization, and composes within-layer contributions in the spirit of Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), with IG completeness playing the role of LRP-style conservation at each boundary. We use LIG to analyze (i) the agreement between module-wise composition and layer-whole attribution under an L2 criterion, and (ii) within-layer information flow by tracing separated ATT and MLP contributions. On BERT-base and PTB, configurations that best preserved within-layer consistency used the target token's embedding as the ATT baseline and either the ATT output at a=0 or Zero as the MLP baseline. We therefore present LIG as a diagnostic XAI tool at module-boundary granularity, without model-specific retraining or per-operation interpreter design. Code is available at https://github.com/eightsuzuki/layer-wise-integrated-gradients.

</details>


### [288] [The Cost Geometry of Belief: finite-resource inference under noisy observation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21585)
*Laurent Caraffa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文在信念空间中引入基于最优传输和Fisher信息共形加权的代价几何，证明了三个不变性结果：确定性不可达的“墙”、诚实(eikonal)代价导致几何与Fisher信息成比例、这些几何是双曲的且高斯分布处于极值地位。代价单位的改变仅缩放几何而不改变这些不变性，表明只有相对代价有意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为信念空间（概率密度空间）赋予有物理意义的代价几何，理解从一种信念过渡到另一种信念所需的"成本"，特别是在有限观测和物理约束下，数字孪生系统如何维持对真实状态的信念。

Method: 将最优传输（Wasserstein距离）与Fisher信息共形加权结合，定义一种不同于Fisher-Rao度量的新几何；通过分析代价单位变换下的不变性，推导出三个几何结果。

Result: (1) "墙"：当代价主导Fisher信息时，确定性（完美信念）距离发散，即精确推断不可达；(2) "诚实"：eikonal代价下几何与Fisher信息成正比；(3) "刚性"：这些几何是双曲的，且Stam界表明高斯分布是最极端的定位-尺度信念。代价单位变化仅缩放几何，不改变上述不变性。

Conclusion: 信念空间的代价几何具有内在的不变性结构，只有相对代价有意义，绝对值无意义。热力学为代价单位提供了物理基础，结果以nats（自然单位）表达。

Abstract: We equip the space of beliefs with a cost geometry (what it costs to pass from one belief to another): optimal transport in Wasserstein space, reweighted conformally by Fisher information (the price of the precision at stake), distinct from the Fisher-Rao metric. In the setting we consider, a finite machine maintains a digital twin of a system; observing the territory through finite, noisy sensors, we model its coherent output as a belief: a probability density over states, the Bayes posterior. Certainty (the perfect twin) is denied twice, by observation and by physics, both read off the Fisher information. On the conformal class, essentially location-scale, three results emerge, all invariants of one change of cost unit. A wall: a well-posed inference rejects certainty to infinite distance as soon as the cost dominates the Fisher information (necessity conjectured beyond power laws). An honesty: an honest (eikonal) cost, each nat the same length everywhere, selects the geometries proportional to the Fisher information. A rigidity: these geometries are hyperbolic, and the Stam bound crowns the Gaussian, the most hyperbolic location-scale belief. Changing the unit dilates the geometry yet preserves the wall, the curvature ordering, and the extremality of the Gaussian: an absolute cost says nothing, only relative cost carries meaning, the value -1/4 being one of its images. The cost of reaching a given precision then has a geometric floor diverging at certainty. Thermodynamics fixes the cost unit and motivates this framework; the results are geometric, in nats.

</details>


### [289] [FAST: A Framework for Aligned Sampling and Training in Parallel Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21587)
*Bonan Wang,Letian Tao,Bin Shuai,Jiaxin Gao,Wenxin Zhao,Wei Xiong,Kehua Sheng,Bo Zhang,Yang Guan,Shengbo Eben Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FAST提出了一种同步并行强化学习框架，通过动态并行采样对齐（DPSA）和缩放掩码填充优化（SMPO）来解决闭环自动驾驶中采样效率低和掉队者效应问题，实现了至少1.78倍的加速且保持统计无偏性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度强化学习在闭环自动驾驶中面临严重的采样效率瓶颈，标准并行采样存在掉队者效应（straggler effect）：单个环境提前终止会导致整个批次同步重置，造成样本利用率低和重置延迟过高。

Method: 1) 动态并行采样对齐（DPSA）：通过虚拟延续已终止的轨迹来维持矢量化同步，将采样循环与单个环境终止解耦，并根据并行片段终止率动态触发全局截断。2) 缩放掩码填充优化（SMPO）：利用有效性掩码和自适应损失归一化来消除辅助填充数据带来的偏差，确保理论一致性。

Result: 相比单片段基线，FAST在保持统计无偏性的前提下实现了至少1.78倍的墙钟时间加速。

Conclusion: FAST有效解决了同步并行采样中的掉队者效应，在不损失数据多样性的前提下消除了过早重置的瓶颈，同时通过严格的偏差修正保证了理论一致性。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning is pivotal for closed-loop autonomous driving yet remains constrained by severe bottlenecks in sampling efficiency. Standard parallel sampling mitigates this but suffers from the straggler effect, where the premature termination of a single environment necessitates a synchronized batch re-initialization, leading to suboptimal sample utilization and prohibitive re-initialization latency. To address this, we propose FAST, a synchronous parallel framework tailored for closed-loop simulation. Specifically, FAST employs Dynamic Parallel Sampling Alignment (DPSA) to maintain vectorization synchronization by extending terminated episodes via virtual continuation, thereby decoupling the sampling loop from individual terminations. By dynamically triggering global truncation based on the termination rate of parallel clips, FAST effectively eliminates the bottleneck of premature resets without sacrificing data diversity. Furthermore, to strictly preserve theoretical consistency, we incorporate a Scaled Mask-Padding Optimization (SMPO) that leverages validity masking and adaptive loss normalization to nullify the bias from auxiliary padding data. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that FAST achieves at least a 1.78 times wall-clock speedup over the single-clip baseline while preserving statistical unbiasedness.

</details>


### [290] [Geometric and Information Compression of Representations in Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21593)
*Linara Adilova,Henning Petzka,Asja Fischer,Bernhard C. Geiger*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度神经网络中，输入与表示之间的互信息（MI）与几何压缩（类簇化）之间的关系，发现低MI并不一定对应几何压缩，两者关系是非线性且可能反转的，并提出泛化能力是潜在混杂因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络的潜在表示可从信息论（互信息）和几何（类簇化）两个维度刻画，但两者关系尚不明确。一个核心开放问题是：低互信息是否必然意味着几何压缩？反之亦然？

Method: 使用条件熵瓶颈（CEB）网络和连续dropout网络，通过类簇化作为几何压缩度量，结合理论可靠的互信息估计方法，在分类任务中引入受控噪声注入方案，系统评估互信息、几何压缩与泛化性能之间的相互作用。

Result: 低互信息与几何压缩之间没有可靠的对应关系；两者呈现负向且非线性的关系，且在改变训练设置时这种关系可能反转。

Conclusion: 互信息与几何压缩之间的关系比通常假设的更为微妙。泛化能力可能是两者关系中的潜在混杂因素，而非直接因果结果。

Abstract: Deep neural networks transform input data into latent representations that support a wide range of downstream tasks. These representations can be characterized along information-theoretic and geometric dimensions, but their relationship remains poorly understood. A central open question is whether low mutual information (MI) between inputs and representations necessarily implies geometrically compressed latent spaces and vice versa. We investigate this question using class-wise clustering as a measure of geometric compression and theoretically sound MI estimation in conditional entropy bottleneck (CEB) networks and continuous dropout networks. We evaluate the interplay between MI, geometric compression, and generalization on classification tasks under controlled noise injection schemes. Our findings show that low MI does not reliably correspond to geometric compression, and that the connection between the two is more nuanced than often assumed. Indeed, our experiments reveal a negative and nonlinear relationship that can reverse when varying training setup. Our results put forward a hypothesis that generalization acts as a potential confounder in this connection rather than being their direct consequence.

</details>


### [291] [Learning to Place Guards by Reinforcement: A Geo-Free Neural Policy for the Vertex-Guard Art Gallery Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21604)
*Domagoj Ševerdija,Jurica Maltar,Nathan Chappel,Domagoj Matijević*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究神经组合优化（NCO）在艺术画廊问题中的表现，发现强化学习训练的编码器已内化了解决可行性所需的几何知识，而解码器的校准不足才是导致性能瓶颈的关键。通过冻结编码器并附加小型分类器，可在不增加几何先验的情况下大幅提升泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NCO策略虽能通过强化学习从原始实例构造解，但其内部到底学到了什么（而非解码器表达了什么）仍不清楚。本文旨在探究NCO策略的内化知识与其表达能力之间的区别。

Method: 训练一个基于指针网络的策略，使用覆盖感知奖励进行强化学习，并在Geo-Free推理约束下测试。随后冻结训练好的编码器，附加一个小型单次分类器，同样在Geo-Free下进行推理，比较性能差异。

Result: Geo-Free推理下原始策略存在覆盖不足的尾部分布且随训练范围扩大而恶化。而冻结编码器+分类器的方法显著缩小了可行性差距，在分布内/外及高达5倍训练范围内，将未覆盖多边形数量降低约一个数量级，代价是守卫数量略有增加。

Conclusion: 强化学习训练得到的表示已经内化了解决可行性所需的几何信息，剩余失败主要源于解码器校准问题而非知识缺失。冻结编码器探查是一种实用的方法，用于检验神经组合优化器已内化了哪些知识。

Abstract: Neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) has shown that policies trained by reinforcement can construct strong solutions to NP-hard problems directly from raw instances. What such a policy actually learns, as opposed to what its decoder expresses, remains much less clear. We study this distinction on the vertex-guard Art Gallery Problem, the NP-hard task of choosing polygon vertices from which to observe an entire region. A pointer-network policy is trained from a coverage-aware reward over its own rollouts under the constraint we call geo-free inference: at test time it sees only vertex coordinates, with no visibility computation and no geometric oracle. The policy places guards economically but leaves a tail of under-covered polygons that widens far beyond the training range. To locate the cause, we freeze the trained encoder and read its embeddings with a small single-shot classifier, still geo-free at inference. The classifier closes most of the feasibility gap, in and out of distribution and at up to roughly five times the training range, cutting under-covered polygons by about an order of magnitude at an explicitly reported cost in guard count. We read this as evidence that the reinforcement-trained representation already encodes the geometry required for feasibility, and that residual failures reflect decoder calibration rather than missing knowledge. Probing a frozen encoder thus offers a practical way to ask what a neural combinatorial solver has internalized.

</details>


### [292] [The Two-Hump Problem: Bridging the Difficulty Gap in Mathematical Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21611)
*Lucas Fagan,Michele Tarquini,Ali Shehper,Maksymilian Manko,Angus Gruen,Coco Huang,Giorgi Butbaia,Davide Passaro,Sergei Gukov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对强化学习在数学搜索问题中面临的稀疏奖励和大搜索空间挑战，以Andrews-Curtis猜想为例，发现了"双峰分布"的结构性障碍，并通过新的数据生成技术和算法改进（超移动、Transformer架构）显著提升了性能，发布了两个大规模基准数据集AC-19和AC-1M。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数学搜索问题对强化学习极具挑战性，存在搜索空间巨大和奖励稀疏的问题。本文以Andrews-Curtis猜想为例，旨在解决该问题领域中存在的"双峰分布"结构性障碍——即问题实例要么极易解决，要么几乎不可能，缺乏中间难度的训练样本，导致学习效果不佳。

Method: 1) 提出新的数据生成技术，用于填充难度分布中的空白区域；2) 引入超移动（supermoves）操作；3) 采用基于Transformer的架构进行算法增强；4) 构建并发布了两个大规模基准数据集：AC-19（125,192个实例，长度≤19）和AC-1M（1,136,154个困难实例，长度≤30）。

Result: 相比之前的基线方法，本文提出的方法在性能上取得了显著提升，并成功构建了首个大规模、公开可用的Andrews-Curtis猜想基准数据集。

Conclusion: 通过数据生成技术和算法改进，有效克服了AC问题中的"双峰分布"障碍，显著提升了强化学习在该数学搜索问题上的表现，并为后续研究提供了大规模标准化的基准数据集。

Abstract: Mathematical search problems present a unique challenge for Reinforcement Learning (RL) due to vast search spaces and sparse rewards. In previous works, the Andrews-Curtis (AC) conjecture was established as an illustrative example of such problems. In this work, we identify a critical structural barrier in the AC landscape: a "Two-Hump" distribution, where problem instances are either trivially solvable or effectively impossible, with a scarcity of intermediate "hard-but-solvable" instances required for effective learning. We tackle this challenge through two primary avenues: novel data generation techniques to populate the difficulty gap, and significant algorithmic enhancements including the introduction of supermoves and Transformer-based architectures. We demonstrate substantial performance improvements over previous baselines, and release new comprehensive benchmark datasets including AC-19 (125,192 AC-trivial presentations of varying difficulty with length at most 19) and AC-1M (1,136,154 hard AC-trivial presentations of length at most 30), the first large-scale, publicly available datasets of this kind.

</details>


### [293] [HERALD: High-Throughput Block Diffusion LLM Serving via CPU-GPU Cooperative KV Cache Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21633)
*Omin Kwon,Doyeon Kim,Jongseok Park,Seung Yul Lee,Ion Stoica,Jae W. Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HERALD是一个针对块扩散LLM的KV缓存卸载系统，通过利用块内去噪步骤中KV条目的一致性，仅需选择一次top-k条目即可在整个块中复用，从而在有限PCIe带宽下实现高效KV卸载，达到近无损精度和显著加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散LLM虽能通过一次前向生成多个token来提升GPU利用率，但其KV缓存随上下文线性增长，长上下文场景下吞吐受限。将KV缓存卸载到主机DRAM可缓解内存压力，但PCIe带宽有限，需要仅召回稀疏的KV子集。

Method: HERALD利用块扩散LLM的特性——块内各去噪步骤中相关KV条目保持一致，通过一次性识别top-k条目并在整个块的所有去噪步骤中复用，将选择计算量降低一个块大小因子，并使选择过程与去噪过程重叠。

Result: 在三种块扩散LLM和五种长上下文任务上，HERALD在5-10% KV预算下实现近无损精度，每块延迟降低高达1.59倍，吞吐量比纯GPU推理提升2.47倍，且加速比随上下文长度增长。

Conclusion: HERALD有效解决了块扩散LLM在长上下文场景下的KV缓存卸载问题，通过块内KV条目复用的特性实现高效稀疏注意力，显著提升推理性能。

Abstract: Diffusion LLMs (dLLMs) improve GPU utilization over autoregressive decoding by generating multiple tokens per forward pass, but their KV cache still grows linearly with context, limiting throughput at long contexts. KV cache offloading to host DRAM alleviates this memory pressure, but the limited PCIe bandwidth necessitates recalling only a sparse subset of KV entries. In block dLLMs, the relevant KV entries remain consistent across denoising steps within a block, enabling high-accuracy selection by identifying the top-k entries once and reusing them throughout all denoising steps. This property appears attractive for offloading as it amortizes the selection overhead across the entire block, but it requires exact attention over the full KV cache, which is too expensive under offloading.
