Method: 利用来自24名早产儿约430小时NICU记录的IP、ECG和PPG信号，由三位独立评审者标注COBE事件（346个COBE事件、608个非COBE事件）。比较了浅层CNN、残差网络（ResNets）和ConvNeXt架构，在独立测试集上进行评估。

Result: 信号模态对检测性能的影响显著大于模型架构复杂度。IP单模态模型平衡准确率86.8-88.0%，优于ECG（62.6-69.7%）和PPG（65.1-66.4%）衍生的呼吸替代信号。多模态融合仅带来小幅提升，最佳模型ConvNeXt（IP+PPG）达88.7%平衡准确率和0.75的F1分数。

Conclusion: 深度学习模型能够利用NICU常规监测信号可靠检测COBE事件，且信号模态选择在数据受限的新生儿监护环境中至关重要。

Abstract: Apnoea of prematurity is characterised by recurrent episodes of cessation of breathing and remains difficult to detect reliably using routinely monitored physiological signals in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU). Existing bedside monitors rely primarily on respiratory rate and oxygen saturation thresholds, often generating high false-positive alarm rates and missing short or irregular events. Improving automated detection using routinely acquired clinical signals could enhance identification of clinically meaningful events without additional sensing hardware.
  We evaluated deep learning-based detection of apnoea-related Cessation Of BrEathing (COBE) events using impedance pneumography (IP), electrocardiography (ECG), and photoplethysmography (PPG) signals from approximately 430 hours of NICU recordings collected from 24 pre-term infants. Three independent reviewers annotated COBE events, producing a dataset of 346 COBE and 608 non-COBE events. We compared a shallow convolutional neural network (CNN), residual networks (ResNets), and a ConvNeXt architecture using an independent held-out test set.
  Across all architectures, detection performance was influenced more strongly by signal modality than by architectural complexity. Unimodal IP-based models achieved balanced accuracies of 86.8-88.0%, outperforming ECG-derived (62.6-69.7%) and PPG-derived (65.1-66.4%) respiratory surrogates. Multimodal fusion yielded modest improvements over IP alone. The best-performing model, a ConvNeXt architecture combining IP and PPG inputs, achieved 88.7% balanced accuracy and an F1 score of 0.75 on the independent test set.
  These findings demonstrate that deep learning models applied to routinely monitored NICU signals can reliably detect COBE events and highlight the importance of signal modality in data-constrained neonatal monitoring settings.

</details>


### [446] [Unlocking In-Context Learning in Audio-Language Models from Decentralized Medical Audio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23243)
*Ran Piao,Tsai-Ning Wang,Martijn den Dekker,Linda Moonen,Hareld Kemps,Yuan Lu,Aaqib Saeed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出联邦自上下文学习框架(FSC)，通过无监督聚类构建伪标签样本，结合多模态语言模型实现小样本临床音频诊断，在2-way 2-shot任务中准确率达71.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源环境下的临床音频诊断缺乏大规模标注数据集，现有方法难以在联邦医院客户端之间实现小样本条件下的准确诊断。

Method: 三阶段流水线：①基于字幕预训练对齐音频嵌入与语言模型；②通过联邦优化使模型适应片段式上下文推理；③测试时利用少量支持集样本对未知查询进行多模态推理。

Result: 在呼吸和心脏疾病诊断任务中，2-way 2-shot评估达到71.6%准确率，比音频语言基线方法提升超过9%。

Conclusion: FSC框架有效解决了低资源临床音频诊断的标注稀缺和联邦学习场景挑战，展示了在上下文学习中的优越性能。

Abstract: Clinical audio diagnosis in low-resource settings requires models that identify conditions from minimal examples without large annotated corpora. We propose Federated Self-Contextualization (FSC), a multimodal language model framework for in-context clinical audio diagnosis across federated hospital clients. FSC constructs pseudo-label episodes via unsupervised clustering of audio representations, bypassing scarce real diagnostic labels, and enables contextual reasoning from support-query pairs. Our progressive three-stage pipeline first aligns audio embeddings with the language model via caption-based pretraining, then adapts it for episodic in-context inference through federated optimization. At test time, given a small labeled support set, the model diagnoses an unseen query through multimodal reasoning. On held-out respiratory and cardiac conditions, FSC achieves 71.6% accuracy in 2-way 2-shot evaluation, outperforming audio-language baselines by over 9%.

</details>


### [447] [Dynamic multi-agent deep reinforcement learning-based pricing and incentivization approach in multimodal transportation networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23257)
*Khadidja Kadem,Mostafa Ameli,Carlos Lima Azevedo,Mahdi Zargayouna,Latifa Oukhellou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多智能体深度强化学习框架，通过动态定价和激励策略协调共享出行服务与公共交通，在高峰期将通勤成本降低约20%、排放减少约10%，同时使公共交通利润接近翻倍并提升空间公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共享出行服务需求集中于高密度区域，导致交通系统效率、排放和空间公平性问题突出，且当局、服务商和出行者三方目标冲突，需要协调机制。

Method: 提出多智能体深度强化学习框架，包含两个RL智能体：(1) 公共当局智能体分配时空公共交通激励以改善公平、排放和效率；(2) 共享出行服务商智能体动态调整票价以优化收入。智能体与交通系统交互并适应动态需求与拥堵状况。

Result: 三小时早高峰实验表明：动态激励可降低拥堵峰值，通勤成本降低约20%，排放减少约10%，公共交通利润接近翻倍，且实现更公平的效益分配；结合动态定价后，两个RL智能体能够平衡公共目标与私人利益之间的冲突。

Conclusion: 该方法可作为可持续与公平的多模式出行规划决策支持工具，有效协调多方利益冲突。

Abstract: In multimodal transportation systems, shared mobility services (SMSs) are promoted for their potential to enhance flexibility and reduce congestion. However, SMS demand is often concentrated in high-density areas, which can limit the effectiveness and accessibility for various commuter groups. This uneven integration challenges transportation system efficiency, especially in terms of emissions and spatial equity. Addressing these issues requires coordination among multiple stakeholders whose objectives frequently conflict. Whereas authorities aim to ensure sustainable and equitable mobility, SMS providers focus on revenue maximization, and travelers seek to minimize personal travel costs. This paper proposes a multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework that captures these interactions through dynamic pricing and incentivization strategies for SMSs and public transport. The framework integrates two reinforcement learning (RL) agents: (i) a public authority that allocates spatio-temporal public transport incentives to improve equity, emissions, and efficiency, and (ii) an SMS provider that dynamically adjusts fares to optimize revenue. The agents interact with the transportation system and adapt strategies in response to evolving demand, congestion, and network conditions. Numerical experiments conducted over a three-hour morning peak period show that dynamic incentivization effectively reduces congestion peaks, lowers commuters' costs by around 20% and emissions by approximately 10%, while nearly doubling public transport profit and supporting a more equitable distribution of benefits. When combined with dynamic SMS pricing, the two RL agents demonstrate the ability to balance conflicting objectives between private providers and public authorities. The proposed approach provides a decision-support tool for sustainable and equitable multimodal mobility planning.

</details>


### [448] [Exposing the Illusion of Erasure in Knowledge Editing for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23276)
*Advik Raj Basani,Anshuman Chhabra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从对抗性诱导视角揭示：知识编辑（KE）算法并未真正删除原知识，而是将其重新分布到表征空间的窄各向异性区域，这些区域极易受扰动，导致编辑可通过间接提示和对抗攻击轻松绕过。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识编辑作为无需重训练即可更新LLM事实的前沿方法，其可靠性和底层机制尚不明确，需要深入探究。

Method: 采用对抗性诱导视角，对多种KE方法进行机制性分析，考察低秩更新对知识表征空间的影响，并分析损失景观特性。

Result: 1) 编辑后的知识并未被擦除，而是重新分布到表征空间中；2) KE方法实质上是降低原事实表达概率的抑制机制，而非移除机制；3) 编辑后的知识位于窄各向异性区域，对扰动高度敏感。

Conclusion: KE算法在架构层面存在固有可绕过性，需要从根本上重新评估在后验更新场景中的部署方式。

Abstract: Knowledge Editing (KE) has emerged as a frontier for updating specific facts in LLMs without costly retraining, but its reliability and underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this work, we examine KE from an adversarial elicitation perspective, revealing that edited knowledge is often not fully erased and continues to surface, with consistent failures observed across diverse model architectures. To explain this behavior, we conduct a mechanistic analysis of popular KE methods. We show that low-rank updates do not overwrite existing knowledge but instead redistribute it within the model's representation space. Furthermore, we find that these methods act as targeted suppression mechanisms that reduce the likelihood of expressing original facts, rather than removing them from the model. Analysis of the loss landscape reveals that edited knowledge lies in narrow, anisotropic regions that are highly sensitive to perturbations, making them highly vulnerable to indirect prompting and adversarial attacks. By exposing these profound architectural vulnerabilities, our work proves that KE algorithms are inherently bypassable and motivates a fundamental reevaluation of how we deploy post-hoc updates in several LLM applications.

</details>


### [449] [Non-asymptotic estimates of the minimal risk in statistical learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23295)
*Liming Wu,Sen Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了统计学习中经验风险原则（ERP）两类错误概率的浓度不等式，给出了最小风险（基于最小经验风险）的非渐近高置信度上下界。将经验风险函数的有界性条件放宽为高斯或指数可积条件，并发现下界置信度与训练参数数量和输入向量维度无关，而上界置信度在样本量远大于参数集的箱维数时较高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统统计学习中的ERP方法通常假设经验风险函数有界，但实际中这一条件往往过强。本文旨在放宽有界性假设，在更一般的Gaussian或指数可积条件下推导最小风险的非渐近浓度不等式，从而更广泛地适用于学习机器的性能评估。

Method: 基于Talagrand浓度不等式（Bousquet和Klein-Rio的尖锐版本）、传输-熵不等式，以及经验过程与统计学习的最新理论成果，推导两类错误概率的浓度不等式。利用Orlicz度量$d_{\psi_1}$下的箱维数刻画参数集的复杂性。

Result: 得到了最小风险的下界和上界的非渐近高置信度估计。下界的置信度与训练参数数量和输入向量维度无关；上界在样本量n远大于参数集在Orlicz度量下的箱维数时具有高置信度。

Conclusion: 本文在更宽松的条件下建立了ERP中最小风险的浓度不等式，为高效检测学习机器的缺陷提供了理论工具，同时揭示了样本量与参数集复杂度之间的关键关系。

Abstract: In this paper we prove some concentration inequalities for two types of error probabilities in the Empirical Risk Principle (ERP) in statistical learning, which provide a lower bound and an upper bound for the minimal risk (in terms of the minimal empirical risk) with non-asymptotic high confidence. The usual boundedness condition of the empirical risk function is relaxed to the Gaussian or exponential integrability condition. The confidence of the lower bound of the minimal risk is shown to be independent of the number of training parameters and the dimension of the input vectors, allowing one to detect the deficiency of a learning machine efficiently; and the confidence of the upper bound of the minimal risk is proved to be high provided that the sample size $n$ is much greater than the box dimension of the parameter set $Θ$ in the Orlicz metric $d_{ψ_1}$ associated with the risk functions. Our work is based on Talagrand's concentration inequalities (the sharp versions by Bousquet and Klein-Rio), transport-entropy inequalities and the recent progress in the theory of empirical processes and statistical learning.

</details>


### [450] [GRIMIP: A General Framework for Instance-Specific Configuration of MIP Solvers Using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23299)
*Yidong Luo,Xuemin Chen,Chenguang Wang,Fangzhou Zhu,Tao Zhong,Tianshu Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GRIMIP框架，将大语言模型的语义推理能力与贝叶斯优化的高效搜索相结合，用于混合整数规划求解器的超参数配置，在多个基准上取得超过40%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MIP求解器的超参数配置是高维、实例依赖的优化问题，默认配置常次优，传统调优方法存在冷启动、搜索效率低或过度依赖专家经验等问题。

Method: 提出GRIMIP混合智能框架，让LLM在贝叶斯优化循环中充当完整的概率代理模型，协同融合LLM的语义推理能力与BO的样本高效搜索能力。

Result: 在MIPLIB等七个基准上，对于困难实例，Primal-Dual Integral降低超过40%，性能优于SMAC及其他LLM辅助BO方法。

Conclusion: 赋予LLM充分自主权，将LLM的专家级推理与BO的高效搜索结合，达到最先进性能水平。

Abstract: Configuring the hyperparameters of Mixed-integer programming (MIP) solvers is a high-dimensional, instance-dependent optimization problem where suboptimal settings can degrade solving time by orders of magnitude. Default configurations are often suboptimal, while traditional tuning methods either suffer from the ``cold-start'' problem and inefficient search or heavily rely on expert experience. This paper introduces \textbf{GRIMIP} (\textbf{\underline{G}}eneral \textbf{\underline{R}}easoning for \textbf{\underline{I}}nstance-specific \textbf{\underline{MIP}} configuration), a novel hybrid intelligence framework that synergistically integrates the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) with the sample-efficient search of Bayesian Optimization (BO). GRIMIP enables the LLM to function as a complete probabilistic surrogate within the BO loop, significantly improving performance and reducing sampling and evaluation costs. On seven benchmarks including MIPLIB, GRIMIP achieves over 40\% reduction in Primal-Dual Integral on hard instances, outperforming SMAC and other LLM-assisted BO methods. By granting LLMs sufficient autonomy, GRIMIP combines the expert-level reasoning of LLMs with the efficient search of BO, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [451] [Superhuman AI for Generals.io Using Self-Play Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23348)
*Matej Straka,Viliam Lisý,Martin Schmid*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个在Generals.io即时战略游戏中达到超人类水平的AI智能体，通过JAX模拟器实现10,000倍加速，仅用4天训练便登上排行榜第一，并详细介绍了其技术方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在具有不完全信息、需要长期规划与短期战术的即时战略游戏中，现有AI方法受限于模拟器速度瓶颈，难以通过自对弈高效学习超人类策略。

Method: 基于JAX原生模拟器实现单GPU每秒数千万帧（比先前快约10,000倍），在此基础上使用视觉Transformer策略网络，通过自对弈策略梯度训练（仅用稀疏胜负奖励），并采用顶级优势样本过滤和策略参数指数移动平均。

Result: 在包含5,000多名真实玩家的1v1排行榜上达到第1名，与第2名差距相当于第2名到第25名的差距；在对阵两位顶尖人类选手的269场比赛中取得199胜70负的战绩。

Conclusion: 快速模拟器消除了数据瓶颈后，揭示了在大规模自对弈训练中真正重要的因素（如样本过滤、EMA），而非复杂的奖励设计或网络结构。

Abstract: We present a superhuman AI agent for Generals.io, a real-time strategy game that requires both long-horizon planning and short-term tactics under strong imperfect information. Trained for four days on 4x NVIDIA H200 GPUs, our agent reaches #1 on the public 1v1 leaderboard of over 5,000 human players, leading the second-ranked player by the same margin that separates second place from 25th, and beats the two top-ranked humans head-to-head with a combined 199-70 record across 269 ladder matches. A key enabler is a JAX-native simulator that reaches tens of millions of frames per second on a single GPU, roughly a 10,000x speedup over the prior simulator. On top of this, we train a vision transformer policy end-to-end by self-play with a policy-gradient loop and sparse win/loss reward, using top-advantage sample filtering and an exponential moving average of the policy parameters. Taken together, our findings highlight what matters, and what does not, once a fast simulator removes the data bottleneck.

</details>


### [452] [SOAP-Bubbles: Structured Weight Uncertainty for Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23357)
*Adrian Robert Minut,Nico Daheim,Marco Miani,Mohammad Emtiyaz Khan,Wu Lin,Thomas Möllenhoff*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过将IVON方法与SOAP优化器结合，提出了一种新的结构化权重不确定性估计方法EVON/SOAP-Bubbles，在保持与SOAP相近计算成本的同时，显著提升了深度学习中后验分布的建模质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化权重不确定性虽能改善深度学习，但估计成本高且实现复杂，现有方法难以兼顾表达力与实用性。

Method: 将IVON（对角协方差变分方法）在SOAP预条件子的特征空间中运行，利用预条件子将对角估计转换为非对角协方差，形成新优化器EVON和新后验SOAP-Bubbles。

Result: 在逻辑回归中，EVON恢复了精确的高斯协方差；在语言模型预训练中，显著优于现有的对角协方差方法。

Conclusion: 该方法使得在大规模深度学习中估计更具表达力的后验分布变得更加容易，且无需对训练流程进行大幅改动。

Abstract: Structured weight-uncertainty can improve many aspects of deep learning, but it remains costly to estimate and difficult to implement. Here, we show that these issues can be addressed by adapting the SOAP optimizer. Our key idea is to run IVON, an existing diagonal-covariance variational method, in the eigenspace of SOAP's preconditioner and then use the preconditioner to transform the diagonal estimate into a non-diagonal covariance. The resulting method has costs similar to those of SOAP and requires no drastic changes to training pipelines. We call the posteriors obtained in this way SOAP-Bubbles and our new optimizer Eigenspace-VON (EVON). We show that, for logistic regression, EVON recovers the exact Gaussian covariance and that, for language model pretraining, it yields significantly better results than existing diagonal-covariance methods. Our work makes it easier to estimate more expressive posterior distributions for deep learning at scale.

</details>


### [453] [Adaptive Hard-Soft Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Robust Boundary-Constrained PDE Solving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23359)
*Duc Tien Nguyen,Trinh Minh Tuan,Nguyen Duc Manh,Vu Linh Nguyen,Dinh Gia Ninh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种统一硬-软物理信息神经网络（HSPINN），通过精确强制边界条件与自适应损失加权，解决了传统PINN收敛慢、对权重敏感、边界不准确等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN使用软惩罚项组合损失函数，存在收敛缓慢、损失权重缩放敏感、优化条件差导致边界条件执行不准确等问题。

Method: 提出HSPINN框架：通过解析/多项式提升、掩蔽函数和周期特征映射精确强制执行Dirichlet和周期边界条件（硬约束），而PDE残差、Neumann通量和初始条件作为软约束；采用逆共享softmax策略动态平衡各损失分量权重。

Result: 在椭圆（Poisson）、抛物（Burgers）和双曲（周期边界对流）问题上，HSPINN相比传统PINN收敛更快、精度更高、稳定性更强。

Conclusion: HSPINN为物理约束深度学习提供了一个通用且可扩展的基础，在科学与技术领域具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide an effective way to solve partial differential equations (PDEs) by embedding physical principles into the learning process. However, the conventional PINN formulation, in which all constraints are imposed as soft penalty terms within a composite loss, often exhibits slow convergence, sensitivity to loss weight scaling, and inaccurate boundary enforcement due to poor conditioning of the optimization landscape. To address these limitations, this study proposes a unified hard--soft physics--informed neural network (HSPINN) with adaptive loss weighting. In this framework, Dirichlet and periodic boundary conditions are enforced exactly by construction through analytical or polynomial lifting, masking functions, and periodic feature mappings, while the governing PDE residuals, Neumann fluxes, and initial conditions are treated as soft constraints. An inverse-share softmax strategy dynamically balances the relative importance of individual loss components during training, eliminating manual penalty tuning and improving gradient stability. This formulation ensures boundary admissibility throughout optimization and enhances convergence efficiency and numerical robustness. Applications to representative elliptic (Poisson), parabolic (Burgers), and hyperbolic (convection with periodic boundaries) problems demonstrate that HSPINN consistently achieves faster convergence, higher accuracy, and greater stability than conventional PINNs, establishing a general and scalable foundation for physics-constrained deep learning across science and technology.

</details>


### [454] [Rethinking Molecular Graph Backdoors under Chemistry-aware Admission](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23361)
*Thinh T. H. Nguyen,Sze Jue Yang,Khoa D. Doan,Chee Seng Chan,Kok-Seng Wong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对分子图神经网络的后门攻击，提出了ChemGuard（化学门控协议）和ChemBack（化学后门攻击），揭示了化学有效性检查能抑制许多图层面后门，但化学有效且与目标对齐的分子后门仍是实际威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子GNN后门攻击评估基于抽象图编辑，忽视了真实分子学习流程中的数据预处理阶段（解析、消毒、规范化、图-字符串一致性检查），导致许多攻击在现实场景中失效。

Method: 提出ChemGuard协议（检查分子字符串可消毒性和图-字符串一致性），以及ChemBack攻击（基于化学基序-锚点连接构建可行毒药，通过Tanimoto相似度排序候选）。

Result: ChemBack在多种分子基准、验证器、架构和防御下实现高后门攻击成功率，且毒药完全通过ChemGuard检查；而许多现有图层面后门因化学无效或表示不一致而失效。

Conclusion: 化学感知的准入检查能抑制许多图后门攻击，但化学有效且目标对齐的分子后门仍是实际威胁，需要更强的防御机制。

Abstract: Backdoor attacks on molecular graph neural networks (GNNs) are typically evaluated as abstract graph edits, but real molecular learning pipelines do not train on arbitrary graphs. Molecular records must first survive parsing, sanitization, canonicalization, and graph-string consistency checks. We formalize this overlooked admission stage as ChemGuard, an operational protocol for testing whether a submitted molecular record can enter a realistic learning pipeline, while complementing existing defenses. ChemGuard admits a record only when its molecular string is sanitizable and the graph reconstructed from that string matches the submitted molecular graph. Under this operational view, many existing graph-based backdoors lose much of their apparent efficacy because their poisons are chemically invalid or representation-inconsistent. We then show that admission checks alone are insufficient to rule out molecular backdoors. We propose ChemBack, an admission-aware molecular backdoor attack that constructs chemically feasible motif-anchor attachments and ranks admitted candidates by fingerprint-based Tanimoto similarity to clean target-class molecules. ChemBack is model-free during trigger selection, using molecular structures, target labels, fingerprints, and public validity checks, but no victim model, surrogate GNN, learned embedding, gradient, logit, or training-code access. Across molecular benchmarks, validators, architectures, and defenses, \textbf{ChemBack} achieves high attack success with fully admitted poisons while preserving clean accuracy. Our results reveal a two-sided lesson, chemistry-aware admission suppresses many graph-only backdoors, yet chemically valid and target-aligned molecular backdoors remain a practical threat.

</details>


### [455] [Convergence of Gradient Descent for General Neural Network Architectures Beyond the NTK Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23364)
*Yuqing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个适用于现代神经网络架构（包括预归一化多层Transformer）的梯度下降收敛分析框架，证明了在温和假设下，GD几乎总能收敛到驻点邻域，并揭示了学习率缩放与深度和有效瓶颈维度相关，而非最大宽度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练动态是理解神经网络的核心，但其理论分析即使对简单架构也很困难，对现代通用架构则更具挑战。现有NTK regime的分析方法局限性强，需要更通用的收敛框架。

Method: 在网络块级别构建框架；通过解析性和测度零论证建立迭代依赖的PL型不等式；通过多项式广义光滑性和局部松弛耗散条件证明GD轨迹上的Lipschitz光滑性；在Xavier初始化和实际架构缩放下解释定理。

Result: 证明了在几乎全部初始化下，使用常规学习率的GD收敛到驻点邻域；学习率缩放取决于深度和有效瓶颈维度，而非最大宽度；推导了残差连接和函数组合的结构非退化含义；提供了全局极小化器的通用刻画。

Conclusion: 该框架覆盖了NTK regime之外的广泛架构和数据集，为理解现代深度网络的训练动态提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: Training dynamics is central to understanding neural networks, yet its theoretical analysis remains difficult even for simple architectures and becomes substantially more challenging for general modern architectures. In this paper, we propose a convergence framework for analyzing gradient descent (GD) dynamics under a broad family of neural network architectures and datasets beyond the neural tangent kernel (NTK) regime. The framework is formulated at the level of network blocks and covers architectures including pre-normalized multi-layer transformers. More precisely, under mild assumptions, we prove that for almost all initializations, GD with regular learning rates converges to the neighbourhood of a stationary point. This is mainly proved by establishing an iterate-dependent PL-type inequality through analyticity and measure-zero arguments, and by proving Lipschitz smoothness along the GD trajectory through polynomial generalized smoothness and a local relaxed dissipative condition. We further interpret the theorem under Xavier initialization and practical architectural scaling, showing that the learning rate scale depends on the depth and effective bottleneck dimensions rather than the largest width. Finally, we derive structural nondegeneracy implications for residual connections and function composition, and provide a generic characterization of global minimizers within our framework.

</details>


### [456] [Distribution-Aware Diffusion-LLM for Robust Ultra-Long-Term Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23391)
*Falguni Ghosh,Vahid Hashemi,Bernhard Kainz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了Diffusion-LLM框架，将条件扩散模型集成到基于LLM的时间序列预测流程中，在六个长期预测基准上优于现有LLM基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在处理非文本数据的多模态设置中存在两个主要挑战：缺乏校准的概率建模能力，以及难以对齐异构表示。

Method: 将条件扩散模型（conditional diffusion model）集成到LLM预测流程中，通过联合设计学习未来数据的条件分布，同时在共享潜空间中改进语义对齐。

Result: 在ETT、Weather、ECL等六个长期预测基准上，Diffusion-LLM持续优于现有LLM基线方法，特别是在超长期和少样本预测场景中表现显著。

Conclusion: 分布感知正则化能够增强时间序列LLM的鲁棒性和泛化能力，证明了将扩散模型与LLM结合的有效性。

Abstract: Time series forecasting is a fundamental machine learning task. Recent work has explored Large Language Models (LLMs) for this purpose due to their strong generalization, pattern recognition, and zero-shot or few-shot capabilities. Despite their suitability for long-context learning, LLMs face challenges in multimodal settings: they lack calibrated probabilistic modeling for non-text data and struggle to align heterogeneous representations. To address these issues, we propose a new framework Diffusion-LLM that integrates a conditional diffusion model into an LLM-based forecasting pipeline. This joint design enables learning the conditional distribution of future data while improving semantic alignment in a shared latent space. We evaluate Diffusion-LLM on six long-term forecasting benchmarks, including ETT, Weather, and ECL. Our method consistently outperforms existing LLM-based baseline, achieving notable gains in ultra-long-term and few-shot forecasting and demonstrating the value of distribution-aware regularization for enhancing robustness and generalization in time series LLMs.

</details>


### [457] [Physics-Informed Modeling for Wood Thermal Analysis and Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23402)
*Jingren Xie,Alex John Buckthal,Ryan Anthony O'Connor,Isak Worre Foged,Dim P. Papadopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出两种物理信息深度学习框架（PICNN和PInteCNN），通过嵌入偏微分方程约束，利用木材RGB图像预测空间异质性木材的像素级热响应，在三个真实多模态数据集上验证了其在预测精度、物理可解释性和种内多样性方面的优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 木材具有复杂空间变化的热特性，传统建筑假设材料均匀性不成立；数据驱动方法虽可直接映射RGB图像到热响应，但作为不可解释的黑箱，优先统计相关性并可能吸收实验噪声，缺乏热力学合理性。

Method: 提出了两种物理信息深度学习框架：1) PICNN（物理信息卷积神经网络），将物理约束作为软惩罚项嵌入损失函数；2) PInteCNN（物理集成卷积神经网络），将解析的近似-预测-校正求解器硬编码到CNN中。两者都施加归一化的二维稳态热传导方程约束。

Result: 在Poplar、Grandis-CC和Grandis-RC三个真实多模态数据集上验证，嵌入物理归纳偏置的方法在预测精度、物理可解释性和种内多样性方面均优于纯数据驱动方法，能更好处理复杂木材异质性并提取可解释的物理参数。

Conclusion: 物理信息深度学习框架有效平衡了预测精度、可解释性和多样性，为处理空间异质性材料的热响应预测提供了可靠方案。

Abstract: Wood materials exhibit complex, spatially varying thermal properties that challenge traditional architectural assumptions of material homogeneity. Although data-driven approaches can directly map wood RGB images to their corresponding thermal responses, they operate as uninterpretable black boxes that prioritize statistical correlation and may absorb experimental noise rather than thermodynamic plausibility. To address these limitations, we present physics-informed deep learning frameworks that integrate partial differential equations (PDEs) to predict pixel-level thermal responses of spatially heterogeneous wood materials using wood RGB images and testbed temperature maps. Specifically, we investigate two distinct approaches to enforcing a normalized 2D steady-state heat transfer equation derived from the general heat transfer equation: Physics-Informed Convolutional Neural Networks (PICNNs), which embed physics as a soft penalty term in the loss function, and Physics-Integrated Convolutional Neural Networks (PInteCNNs), which hard-code an analytical approximator-predictor-corrector solver directly into convolutional neural networks. To validate our proposed approaches, we collect three real-world multimodal datasets of Poplar, Grandis Cross-Cut (Grandis-CC), and Grandis Radial-Cut (Grandis-RC) wood samples. We further demonstrate that embedding physical inductive biases successfully balances predictive accuracy, physical interpretability, and intra-species diversity, outperforming data-driven approaches in handling complex wood material heterogeneity and enabling the extraction of interpretable physical parameters. Project: https://zekifayes.github.io/pim

</details>


### [458] [HyperQuant: A Rate-Distortion-Optimal Quantization Pipeline for Large Language and Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23406)
*Yuval Domb,Hadar Sackstein,Tomer Solberg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HyperQuant 是一个统一的后训练量化管线，用于大语言模型和扩散Transformer的权重及KV缓存。通过组合随机化Hadamard变换、最优格量化（E8/D4/A2/Z）、无损比特剥离与近熵最优变长Rice编码、以及KV缓存偏差校正，在3-5 bps权重量化和低至1.7 bps的KV量化上超越现有方法，实现近无损压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量化方案在权重和KV缓存上各有优劣，缺乏统一的、能在极低位宽下保持高质量的统一管线。需要一种结合多种技术优势的方案，同时兼容现代硬件Tensor Core路径。

Method: (i) 逐块随机化Hadamard变换使分布近似高斯；(ii) 量化到低维最优格点（E8/D4/A2/Z）；(iii) 无损比特剥离+近熵最优变长Rice编码；(iv) KV缓存偏差校正保持内积无偏。集成8-bit和4-bit Tensor Core MMA路径（fp8/int8/nvfp4/mxfp4）。

Result: 在权重3-5 bps上全面优于HIGGS；KV量化低至1.7 bps超越TurboQuant和OCTOPUS；量化19B视频模型无可见伪影；H100上4 bps时权重压缩~3.9x、KV缓存压缩~3.79x，近无损质量。

Conclusion: HyperQuant通过四种已知技术的精心组合，实现了统一的、硬件友好的高压缩比量化方案，在多种模型和位宽下均达到SOTA性能。

Abstract: We present HyperQuant (Hadamard, optimallY Packing, Entropy Rice-coding), a unified post-training quantization pipeline for the weights and the KV cache of large language and diffusion transformers. Across a suite of self-contained experiments (Table 1), HyperQuant outperforms the recent HIGGS scheme at every operating point from 3 to 5 bits per scalar (bps) on weights, and beats both TurboQuant and OCTOPUS on KV quantization down to 1.7 bps. Beyond the LLM setting, HyperQuant quantizes the 19B-parameter LTX-2 DiT video model with no observable per-frame artifacts. End-to-end on an H100 at 4 bps, HyperQuant compresses the linear weights ~3.9x and the KV cache ~3.79x at near-lossless quality.
  HyperQuant combines four known ideas into a single construction: (i) a per-tile Randomized Hadamard Transform that makes the per-coordinate distribution of weights and activations approximately Gaussian; (ii) quantization to a low-dimensional optimal lattice (E8, D4, A2, or Z); (iii) lossless bit-stripping and near-entropy-optimal variable-length Rice coding of the lattice indices; and (iv) bias-correction methods for the KV cache that keep the reconstruction unbiased under inner products, preserving attention semantics. We further integrate the pipeline with 8-bit and 4-bit Tensor-Core MMA paths (fp8-e4m3, int8, nvfp4, mxfp4), and find that int8 beats fp8 on the post-RHT lattice output. Project page: https://moonmath.ai/hyperquant/

</details>


### [459] [Differential Spectral Damping Gap Adaptive Regularization for Ill-Conditioned Kernel Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23407)
*Praveg Vashishtha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出差分谱阻尼（DSD）方法，基于Davis-Kahan sin(Θ)定理，根据特征间隙大小自适应惩罚，解决核方法（尤其是LSTSVM）中矩阵病态问题。实验表明，DSD在分类精度上显著优于标准Tikhonov正则化，最高提升10.4个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 核方法中的矩阵求逆（如LSTSVM）面临指数级特征值衰减导致的严重病态问题，而标准Tikhonov正则化对所有特征向量施加均匀阻尼，未考虑不同特征向量的可靠性差异。

Method: 提出差分谱阻尼（DSD）：基于Davis-Kahan sin(Θ)定理，对特征间隙大的特征向量（可靠）保留，对特征间隙小的特征向量（方向已被破坏）进行强抑制，并选择指数形式作为阻尼函数以保证平滑性、可微性和自然饱和特性。

Result: 在GINA数据集（d=970）上分类精度提升+4.8个百分点（Cohen's d=4.49, p<0.0001），在d=200时提升+10.4个百分点，在Madelon（d=500）上提升+2.6个百分点。高噪声下流形预图像重构与Tikhonov持平，两者均降低朴素反演误差66倍。

Conclusion: DSD在维度d≥100、条件数>10³时优势显著，为实践者提供了清晰的部署指导。

Abstract: Kernel methods requiring matrix inversion -- particularly Least-Squares Twin Support Vector Machines (LSTSVM) -- suffer from exponential eigenvalue decay in their system matrices, producing severely ill-conditioned problems where standard Tikhonov regularization applies uniform damping regardless of eigenvector reliability. We propose Differential Spectral Damping (DSD), a regularization formula that adapts its penalty to localized eigengap structure: preserving eigenvectors with large spectral gaps (reliable per Davis-Kahan perturbation theory) while aggressively suppressing those with small gaps (directionally corrupted beyond recovery). We motivate DSD through a principled design procedure grounded in the Davis-Kahan $\sin(Θ)$ theorem, systematically deriving the requirements for a reliability-aware damping function and selecting the exponential form for its smoothness, differentiability, and natural saturation properties. Through rigorous paired testing with fairly optimized baselines (including gradient-optimized Tikhonov receiving equal optimization opportunity), we demonstrate that DSD improves LSTSVM classification accuracy by +4.8 percentage points on real-world GINA ($d=970$, Cohen's $d = 4.49$, $p < 0.0001$), +10.4 percentage points at $d=200$, and +2.6 percentage points on Madelon ($d=500$) -- all using only principled spectral initialization while Tikhonov receives grid search. For pre-image reconstruction on manifold data, DSD ties Tikhonov at high perturbation noise ($p=0.99$) but slightly underperforms at lower noise levels; both reduce naive inversion error by $66\times$. We characterize the precise operating regime ($d \geq 100$, condition number $> 10^3$) and document where simpler methods suffice, providing practitioners with clear deployment guidance.

</details>


### [460] [Leveraging Similarities in Multi-Armed Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23414)
*Khaled Eldowa,Thibaud Rahier,Augustin Cablant,Panayotis Mertikopoulos,Pierre Gaillard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究具有相似性结构的在线学习问题，提出基于树结构编码动作相似性的框架，证明单点反馈无法利用相似性，但设计了能在半反馈到多点反馈等多种反馈模型下自适应利用相似性的算法，实现用相似感知有效动作数替换总动作数的遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线学习和赌博机问题中，动作之间往往存在内在相似性（如共享潜在特征、标签或层次结构），但传统方法未能有效利用这种结构信息。作者希望探究如何在理论上理解和利用这种相似性来改进学习效率。

Method: 提出树兼容损失假设（树中相近动作的损失相近），建立了不可能性结果（单点反馈无法利用相似性），并设计了一套统一算法框架，覆盖从半反馈到多点反馈（包括最小两点反馈）的多种反馈模型，实现了"两全其美"的保证。

Result: 算法能够用相似感知有效动作数K_eff替代总动作数K来改进遗憾界；在两点反馈下，实现了d≤2的Lipschitz赌博机中的√T遗憾。

Conclusion: 单点反馈无法利用动作相似性，但更丰富的反馈模式（如两点反馈）可以显著利用相似性结构获得更好的理论保证。

Abstract: In many online learning and bandit problems, the actions we consider possess inherent similarities--for instance because they share latent traits, tags, or hierarchical structure. We study online learning with a similarity-structured action set, encoded by a rooted tree whose leaves are the actions and whose levels quantify how closely two actions are related. The loss sequence is assumed tree-compatible: losses of similar actions are constrained to be close. We establish an impossibility result showing that usual one-point bandit feedback cannot, in general, leverage range or tree-induced similarity, even under very strong similarity constraints. We then provide a unified set of algorithms which adapt to a wide range of richer feedback models, from semi-bandit feedback down to multi-point bandit protocols, including the minimal two-point feedback setting. We show these algorithms exhibit best-of-both-worlds guarantees and provably exploit action similarities by replacing the number of actions $K$ by a similarity-aware effective number of actions $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ in the regret bounds. As an application, we show that under two-point feedback, it is possible to achieve $\sqrt{T}$ regret in Lipschitz bandits when $d \leq 2$.

</details>


### [461] [GRINQH: Graded Input-based Quantization Hierarchy for Efficient LLM Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23419)
*Jette Oberländer,Jan Finkbeiner,Catherine M. Schöfmann,Emre Neftci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GRINQH是一种面向大语言模型解码加速的权重量化框架，通过结合量化与稀疏化，根据激活幅度动态分配权重通道到不同精度层级，在Llama3和Qwen3上实现了优于现有方法的性能，并建立了生成质量与推理速度之间新的帕累托前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归解码主要受限于GPU显存带宽，尤其在边缘计算场景中。现有量化方法将推理视为统一过程，未能区分计算密集的预填充阶段和内存密集的解码阶段之间的非对称性。

Method: 提出GRINQH框架，利用激活幅度作为计算重要性的代理指标，动态地将权重通道分配到不同精度级别，实现解码过程中灵活的平均位宽。同时采用层级嵌套内存布局进行多精度存储，并通过自定义GPU内核实现加速。

Result: 在Llama3和Qwen3模型上，GRINQH在3位和4位设置下优于最先进的固定精度和混合精度基线，并能实现有效的2位生成。实验验证了理论加速效果。

Conclusion: GRINQH建立了大语言模型生成的新帕累托前沿，实现了生成质量与推理速度之间的动态权衡。

Abstract: Autoregressive decoding with LLMs is primarily bottlenecked by GPU memory bandwidth, especially in edge-computing settings. While quantization is essential for mitigating this bottleneck, most existing methods treat inference as a uniform process and fail to account for the asymmetry between the compute-bound prefill stage and the memory-bound decoding stage. We propose GRINQH (GRaded INput-based Quantization Hierarchy), a weight-only post-training quantization framework that accelerates decoding by unifying quantization and sparsification. GRINQH leverages activation magnitudes as a proxy for computational importance to dynamically assign weight channels to different precision levels, enabling flexible average bit widths during decoding. Evaluated on Llama3 and Qwen3 models, GRINQH outperforms state-of-the-art fixed- and mixed-precision baselines at comparable 3- and 4-bit settings, even enabling effective 2-bit generation. We experimentally verify theoretical speedups by leveraging a hierarchical nested memory layout for multi-precision storage in a custom GPU kernel. Ultimately, GRINQH establishes a new state-of-the-art Pareto frontier for LLM generation, enabling a dynamic trade-off between generation quality and inference speed.

</details>


### [462] [Interpretable Kolmogorov-Arnold Network with Feature-Isolated Temporal Attention Mechanism for Electricity Load Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23425)
*Jinhao Li,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LoadKAN，一种融合特征隔离时序注意力机制与KAN网络的混合可解释电力负荷预测框架，在三个美国电力市场数据集上达到与黑盒深度学习模型相当的预测性能，同时通过KAN学习的激活函数实现了对负荷与人类移动性之间非线性关系的可解释分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习负荷预测模型性能优异但缺乏可解释性；KAN网络虽有可学习激活函数的优势，但直接应用于时序预测存在困难，简单集成也未能充分发挥其可解释性潜力。

Method: 构建LoadKAN框架，包含两个核心模块：1）特征隔离时序注意力机制，独立提取每个输入特征（如历史负荷、人类移动性）的时序动态；2）KAN模块，接收注意力机制输出的特征表示进行可解释预测。

Result: 在三个美国电力市场数据集上，LoadKAN与经过充分调优的最先进黑盒深度学习模型相比保持了高度竞争力；通过KAN学习的激活函数，定量敏感性分析揭示了六种不同移动性模式与电力负荷之间复杂且具有市场依赖性的非线性关系。

Conclusion: LoadKAN在保持预测性能的同时提供了可解释性，能够生成传统黑盒神经预测模型难以揭示的洞察，证明了其在电力负荷预测领域的应用价值。

Abstract: Accurate electricity load forecasting is a crucial prerequisite for stable power system operations. While prevalent deep learning models present competitive performance, they often operate as black boxes and lack interpretability. While the Kolmogorov-Arnold network (KAN) has emerged as a promising alternative because of its learnable activation function design, its direct application to time-series forecasting faces challenges in modeling complex temporal data patterns. Also, simple integration into existing architectures, such as serving as replacement of neural modules, cannot fully leverage KAN's interpretability strengths. To address these gaps, this study develops LoadKAN, a novel hybrid and interpretable framework for load forecasting that synergistically combines a specifically-designed feature-isolated temporal attention mechanism with a KAN module. The attention stage aims to extract temporal dynamics from each input feature independently, such as historical load and human mobility, providing distilled feature representations to the KAN module for interpretable predictions. When evaluated on datasets from three representative U.S. electricity markets, our LoadKAN remains highly competitive when compared to extensively-tuned, state-of-the-art, black-box deep learning benchmarks. More importantly, LoadKAN's interpretability enables a granular analysis of the learned non-linear relationships between six distinct mobility patterns and electricity load. Through KAN-learned activation functions, our quantitative sensitivity analyses on mobility features reveal complex and market-specific dependencies. These findings further demonstrate the ability of our LoadKAN to generate insights often obscured by opaque black-box neural forecasting models.

</details>


### [463] [What Does a Chemical Language Model Know About Molecules?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23443)
*Christian Kenneth,Etowah Adams,Liam Bai,Gerard JP van Westen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）分析化学语言模型（cLMs）MolFormer的内部机制，发现早期层学习位置追踪以解析分子语法，后期层编码原子-子结构和药理学特征；非规范SMILES比无效SMILES对表征的破坏更大，并开发了交互式可视化工具InterMol。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"化学语言模型仅学习表面句法模式而非分子语义"的普遍假设，通过机械性分析揭示cLMs内部如何构建分子表征。

Method: 对编码器型cLM（MolFormer）应用稀疏自编码器（SAEs），逐层分析分子表征的构建过程；对比规范SMILES、非规范SMILES和无效SMILES的表征变化；开发InterMol可视化工具。

Result: 早期层依赖位置追踪隐变量解析分子语法；后期层编码原子-子结构和药理学特征；非规范SMILES比无效SMILES引发更大的表征扰动，由位置隐变量的跨层传播导致。

Conclusion: cLMs并非仅学习表面模式，而是通过分层机制逐步构建有意义的分子语义表征，其中位置追踪是关键的语法解析机制。

Abstract: Chemical language models (cLMs) are widely assumed to learn surface-level syntactic patterns rather than learning meaningful molecular semantics. Here, we apply sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to MolFormer, an encoder-only cLM, to mechanistically examine how molecular representations are built across layers. We discover that early layers rely on position-tracking latents to parse molecular grammar, while later layers encode atom-in-substructure and pharmacologically relevant features. Additionally, we show that non-canonical SMILES produce more disruptive representation shifts than invalid SMILES, driven by position-latent disruption propagating across layers. To support further exploration, we develop InterMol, an interactive visualizer for SAE activations on molecular strings and structures.

</details>


### [464] [Selective Time Series Forecasting via Metalearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23448)
*Ricardo Inácio,Vitor Cerqueira,Marília Barandas,Carlos Soares*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种选择性预测框架，通过元学习基于滞后结构特征建模预测误差的经验百分位数，实现跨异构时间序列的拒绝机制迁移，提升预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有拒绝机制依赖预测区间宽度或置信分数等代理指标，这些方法与训练域强相关，泛化能力有限。需要一种与域无关的拒绝策略。

Method: 通过元学习从近期滞后数据中提取结构特征，建模预测误差的经验百分位数（尺度不变统计量），将拒绝决策与预测过程解耦。

Result: 在域内和迁移学习设置下，拒绝被预测为困难的样本均能持续提升各覆盖率水平的预测精度。

Conclusion: 该框架通过域无关特征实现有效的拒绝策略迁移，可提升异构时间序列预测的鲁棒性和准确性。

Abstract: Deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art in time series forecasting, yet their accuracy varies considerably across samples, as some instances remain inherently difficult to predict. Reject option mechanisms, which allow models to abstain from high-risk predictions, are well established in classification and regression but underexplored in forecasting. Existing abstention strategies typically rely on proxies, such as the width of the prediction interval or learned confidence scores derived from forecasts. However, these approaches are inherently tied to the training domain, limiting their ability to generalize. We propose a selective forecasting framework that addresses this limitation by modeling the empirical percentile of forecasting errors, that is, a scale-invariant statistic, based on structural characteristics extracted from recent lags via metalearning. By decoupling the rejection decision from the forecast itself and grounding it in domain-agnostic features, the framework enables effective abstention transfer across heterogeneous time series. Experiments in both in-domain and transfer learning settings show that rejecting samples predicted as challenging consistently improves forecasting accuracy across coverage levels.

</details>


### [465] [Do Location Encoders Capture Spatial Effects? A GeoShapley Benchmark Across Scales](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23453)
*Daniel Kiv,Shaowen Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了GeoShapley方法能否从位置编码器生成的嵌入中恢复可解释的空间变化系数，涵盖11种编码器、三种尺度及不同训练条件，发现主系数恢复效果稳定，次系数依赖尺度，且原始坐标基线始终具有竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 位置编码器能将地理坐标转换为高维嵌入用于机器学习，但这类表示能否捕捉可解释的空间效应尚不明确，因此需要系统评估其可解释性恢复能力。

Method: 使用GeoShapley（一种将位置特征视为联合博弈方的可解释性方法），基于已知系数的合成过程，在三种尺度（网格、县、全局）、是否包含原始坐标、未经训练和对比训练条件下，对TorchSpatial框架中的11种编码器进行基准测试。

Result: 主系数恢复在所有编码器上表现一致良好；次系数恢复存在尺度依赖性，在全球尺度上差异最大；原始坐标基线在所有条件下保持竞争力。

Conclusion: GeoShapley能有效恢复位置编码器中的主空间效应，但次系数恢复受尺度影响显著，且简单的原始坐标基线仍难被超越。

Abstract: Location encoders transform geographic coordinates into high dimensional embeddings for downstream machine learning, but it is unclear how well these representations capture interpretable spatial effects. We benchmark whether GeoShapley, a game-theoretic explainer that treats all location features as a single joint player, can recover spatially varying coefficients from models built on location-encoder embeddings. Eleven encoders from the TorchSpatial framework are evaluated against a synthetic process with known coefficients, across three scales (grid, county, global), with and without raw coordinates alongside the embedding, and under untrained and contrastively trained conditions. Measuring recovery as the correlation between estimated and true coefficients, we report how it varies with scale and encoder architecture and compare the embeddings against a raw-coordinate baseline. Recovery of the primary coefficient is consistently high across encoders, whereas recovery of a secondary coefficient is more scale-dependent, differing most at the global scale; the raw-coordinate baseline remains competitive throughout.

</details>


### [466] [TROPT: An Open Framework for Unifying and Advancing Discrete Text Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23496)
*Matan Ben-Tov,Mahmood Sharif*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TROPT是一个统一离散文本优化器的开源框架，集成了30+优化方案、15+优化器和15+损失函数，支持跨领域应用（如LLM越狱、嵌入模型投毒），显著降低了离散文本优化的使用和开发门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散文本优化器分散在不同研究代码库中，与特定模型、目标和问题域绑定；优化器变体繁多，工程开销大，难以进行横向对比，阻碍了优化器的采用和进步。

Method: 构建TROPT开源框架，统一离散优化器的执行和开发接口，支持模块化替换模型、目标和优化器，集成15+优化器（白盒到黑盒）和15+损失函数，提供30+预置优化方案。

Result: 通过大规模实验对比LLM越狱优化策略，揭示了有效但未被充分采用的技术；成功将优化器从一个领域（如LLM越狱）迁移到新领域（如嵌入模型语料投毒）。

Conclusion: TROPT显著降低了离散文本优化的采用和推进门槛，为研究和应用提供了统一、可扩展的基础设施。

Abstract: Discrete text-trigger optimization -- searching for text sequences that, when ingested by a model, steer it toward a specified objective -- underpins model red-teaming (e.g., LLM jailbreaks), as well as auditing and interpretability. However, the current state of discrete optimizers hinders their adoption and progress. First, existing optimizers, when open-sourced at all, are scattered across research codebases tied to specific models, objectives, and problem domains. Second, optimizer variants proliferate, each requiring engineering overhead to use or extend, and remaining hard to compare head-to-head. Together, these raise the bar for adopting optimizers in existing or new domains, and for advancing them via new strategies. We address these gaps with TROPT, the first open-source framework that unifies discrete optimizers' execution and standardizes their development under a single interface. TROPT makes it easy to customize end-to-end optimization recipes by swapping any component -- models, objectives, and optimizers -- extending its reach across domains and new applications. TROPT currently ships with 30+ optimization recipes -- covering applications such as jailbreaking and probing model internals -- built from 15+ optimizers (spanning white-box to black-box access) and 15+ losses, from foundational to state-of-the-art methods. Demonstrating its utility, we leverage TROPT in several studies: (i) controlled, large-scale experiments comparing and enhancing optimization strategies for LLM jailbreaks, revealing potent-yet-underadopted techniques; and (ii) porting optimizers from one domain (e.g., LLM jailbreak) to new domains (e.g., corpus-poisoning embedding model). In all, TROPT significantly lowers the barrier to adopting and advancing discrete text optimization.

</details>


### [467] [Collapsed Effective Operators for Higher-order Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23517)
*Maximilian Krahn,Lennart Bastian,Vikas Garg,Björn Schuller,Tolga Birdal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为“折叠有效算子”的方法，通过Schur补将高阶结构压缩为顶点级算子，保留了正半定性并降低了系统能量，在谱聚类、信号平滑和图神经网络位置编码中展现了优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高阶拓扑算子在分解时会产生不同秩的谱信息，缺乏统一有效的顶点级融合方式，导致信息整合依赖人为选择，缺乏系统性和理论保证。

Method: 通过对分级拉普拉斯矩阵进行Schur补操作，将高阶自由度压缩为（通常稠密的）顶点级算子，该算子编码拓扑介导的长程交互，适用于任意高阶结构。

Result: 证明了该方法保持正半定性，且谱上界不高于0阶Hodge拉普拉斯算子，有效降低了高阶连通性下的系统能量；在谱聚类、信号平滑和位置编码等任务上表现优异。

Conclusion: 折叠有效算子为高阶拓扑信息融入顶点级分析提供了一种统一、理论保证且实用的工具，显著提升了相关学习任务的性能。

Abstract: Higher-order structures are powerful relational modeling tools, yet existing spectral operators decompose the topology into separate ranks, leaving practitioners to fuse the information back to vertices through ad hoc choices. We introduce Collapsed Effective Operators, which condense higher-order degrees of freedom into a single vertex-level operator via Schur complementation of a graded Laplacian. This yields a (generally dense) operator that encodes long-range interactions mediated by topology and is applicable to arbitrary higher-order constructs. We show it preserves positive semi-definiteness with a spectral upper bound relative to the rank-0 Hodge Laplacian, effectively lowering system energy under higher-order connectivity. Empirically, our operator improves spectral clustering, signal smoothing, and enables the inclusion of topological features in neural network architectures via positional encoding. The project page can be found http://circle-group.github.io/research/CollapsedEffectiveOperators

</details>


### [468] [Simulation-Free Estimation of Traffic Flows from Sparse Count Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23536)
*Davide Guastella,Gianluca Bontempi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种从稀疏聚合车辆计数中估计时变交通流模式的方法，通过区域划分、路线构建和加权最小二乘优化实现，在布鲁塞尔路网上的评估表明该方法能复现交通日变化特征且计算成本低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以从稀疏聚合的车辆计数数据中准确估计时变交通流模式，需要一种计算高效且能利用传感器覆盖信息的方法。

Method: 将研究区域划分为空间区域，构建可行的区域间路线集，通过加权最小二乘优化分配车辆数，利用加权贡献矩阵编码传感器覆盖信息，最后根据时空特征对候选路线评分得到边级轨迹。

Result: 在布鲁塞尔路网上的真实和合成数据实验中，该方法能复现输入数据的日交通流特征，且以更低计算成本优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了从稀疏聚合计数中高效估计交通流模式的可行性，为大规模路网交通监测提供了低成本解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a method for estimating time-varying traffic flow patterns from sparse aggregated vehicle counts. The method partitions the study area into spatial regions, constructs a set of feasible region-to-region routes, and solves a weighted least-squares optimization problem to determine the number of vehicles to allocate on each route. A weighted contribution matrix encodes sensor coverage, steering the optimizer toward flow configurations that are directly observable by sensors. Edge-level trajectories are then derived by scoring candidate routes against the temporal and volumetric profiles of aggregated regional sensor counts.
  The method is evaluated on the Brussels road network using real and synthetic traffic data. Results show that the proposed approach reproduces the daily traffic profile in the input data and outperforms the baseline methods at a fraction of the computational cost.

</details>


### [469] [The Energy Consumption of Transformer Fine-Tuning: A Roofline-Inspired Scaling Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23546)
*Mansour Zoubeirou a Mayaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一个用于建模Transformer在多GPU上训练能耗的框架，通过轻量级代理指标和类屋顶线模型，能够准确预测异构配置下的训练能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着Transformer模型规模和并行度的不断提升，训练能耗急剧增长，准确预测能耗对可持续性和成本感知的系统设计至关重要。

Method: 通过对BERT模型进行受控架构扫描，将测量能耗与计算量、内存流量和硬件效率等轻量级代理指标关联；受屋顶线模型启发，引入基于加速比的硬件效率因子来捕捉张量并行和全分片数据并行的效果，最终推导出缩放律模型。

Result: 所提出的缩放律模型能够在异构配置下准确预测训练能耗。

Conclusion: 该框架为可持续、成本感知的大规模模型训练提供了有效的能耗预测工具，有助于优化系统设计。

Abstract: Transformer-based models underpin modern natural language processing but incur rapidly growing computational and energy costs. As training scales in both model size and parallelism, accurately predicting energy consumption has become critical for sustainable and cost-aware system design. We present a framework for modeling the energy consumption of Transformer training on multiple GPUs. Using controlled architectural sweeps of BERT models, we relate measured energy to lightweight proxies for compute, memory traffic, and hardware efficiency. Inspired by roofline models, our approach incorporates a speedup-based hardware-efficiency factor that captures the effects of tensor parallelism and fully sharded data parallelism. We derive a scaling law model that accurately predicts training energy across heterogeneous configurations.

</details>


### [470] [Scheduling Thoughts: Learning the Order of Thought in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23567)
*Jiawei Xu,Minghui Liu,Aakriti Agrawal,Yifan Chen,Furong Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS)方法，通过可导出的上界将掩码扩散语言模型的解码顺序选择转化为策略优化问题，学习轻量级顺序策略，在数独和数学推理任务上显著优于启发式调度方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型的解码顺序（"思考顺序"）对生成质量影响很大，但现有方法通常采用启发式方法选择解码顺序，缺乏理论指导。

Method: 推导了顺序解码不匹配的KL散度上界（基于路径对数似然），将顺序选择建模为策略优化问题；提出SAS方法，使用GRPO学习轻量级顺序策略，可应用于any-order和semi-autoregressive解码。

Result: 在Sudoku（1B MDM）上，准确率从82.0%提升至91.8%，微调后达97.5%；在LLaDA-8B上，GSM8K pass@1从64%提升至76%，MBPP从39.5%提升至41%。

Conclusion: SAS方法将解码顺序选择从启发式提升为理论驱动的优化问题，在多个任务上一致超越最佳启发式调度，为扩散解码顺序学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Masked diffusion language models decode by iteratively unmasking tokens, where the unmasking order defines an "order of thought" that strongly influences generation quality yet is typically chosen heuristically. We derive a tractable upper bound on the sequential decoding mismatch, measured by the Kullback-Leibler divergence and expressed in terms of the model's pathwise log-likelihood, with tightness under sufficient model expressivity. This bound induces a dense self-aware reward over ordered trajectories, casting order selection as a principled policy optimization problem with a frozen denoiser. We instantiate this idea as Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS), which learns a lightweight order policy using Group Relative Policy Optimization and applies seamlessly to both any-order and semi-autoregressive decoding. On Sudoku with 1B MDM, SAS improves puzzle accuracy from 82.0% (best heuristic schedule) to 91.8%, and reaches 97.5% with second-stage fine-tuning along learned trajectories. On mathematical reasoning with LLaDA-8B, SAS improves pass@1 on GSM8K from 64% to 76% and on MBPP from 39.5% to 41%, consistently matching or exceeding heuristic schedules across generation lengths and block sizes. Project page: https://jimmyxu123.github.io/SAS

</details>


### [471] [SVD-Surgeon: Optimal Singular-Value Surgery for Large Language Model Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23568)
*Mahmoud Safari,Frank Hutter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SVD-Surgeon，一种无需训练的低秩压缩方法，将最优脑外科医生(OBS)框架应用于奇异值基，通过闭式更新保留的奇异值来补偿截断造成的损失，可叠加在现有SVD压缩方法上提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型(LLM)虽性能卓越，但部署时受限于巨大的内存和计算需求。现有低秩压缩(如SVD)方法仅关注如何分解和保留哪些成分，缺乏对截断后损失补偿的考虑。

Method: 将OBS框架引入奇异值基，将每个奇异值视为参数，计算保留奇异值的闭式更新以二阶近似补偿截断损失，同时推导出修剪奇异值的显著性指标。方法无需训练，可直接叠加于现有SVD压缩器。

Result: 在SVD-LLM这一领先的SVD方法上应用SVD-Surgeon，在OPT系列和LLaMA 2-7B上改进了困惑度-压缩权衡，且无需任何重训练。

Conclusion: SVD-Surgeon是一种高效、即插即用的LLM低秩压缩增强方法，通过理论驱动的奇异值补偿更新显著提升了压缩质量。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks, but their deployment is constrained by substantial memory and compute requirements. Low-rank compression via singular value decomposition (SVD) is an effective remedy, but existing methods focus on how to factorize and which components to keep. We introduce SVD-Surgeon, a training-free method that brings the Optimal Brain Surgeon (OBS) framework to the singular-value basis. Treating each singular value as a parameter, it computes a closed-form update of the retained singular values that compensates, to second order in the model loss, for those removed by truncation. The same analysis yields a saliency for choosing which values to prune. As it operates directly on the singular-value factorization, SVD-Surgeon can be layered on top of existing SVD compressors. Applied to SVD-LLM, a leading SVD-based method, it improves the perplexity-compression trade-off on the OPT family and LLaMA 2-7B without any retraining.

</details>


### [472] [Patient-Aware Contrastive Learning Preserves Per-Patient Structure in RR-Interval Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23570)
*Yasantha Niroshana,Weijith Wimalasiri,Chathuranga Hettiarachchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对生理信号中个体差异掩盖类别差异的问题，提出一种患者感知的对比学习目标，通过保持同一患者同一类别的正样本对来保留个体基线模式，在房颤检测任务上实现了更好的跨患者泛化性能（AUROC 0.989）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在生理信号表示学习中，每个受试者有其独特的基线模式，类别差异与个体差异存在重叠。监督对比学习等传统方法倾向于将个体结构合并到类簇中，丢失了个体变异信息，导致模型难以泛化到未见过的患者。

Method: 提出患者感知对比学习目标（patient-aware contrastive objective），仅在相同患者、相同类别的心跳区间片段之间构建正样本对，在保持每个患者自身窦性心律基线结构的同时推动不同类别分离。

Result: 患者内SR结构一致性达到0.850（SupCon为0.800，BCE为0.772）；在IRIDIA-AF数据集上，患者无关AUROC达0.989±0.003，种子方差比监督对比基线低2.6倍。

Conclusion: 在跨患者泛化中，每个受试者的几何一致性比全局类别可分性更为关键。BCE虽能获得最干净的全局类别分离，但破坏了患者内结构，导致线性探针在未见患者上性能下降。

Abstract: Contrastive representation learning struggles on physiological signals when each subject contributes a distinct baseline pattern. If class differences overlap with subject differences,class-level objectives such as supervised contrastive learning tend to merge per-subject structure into a single per-class cluster,removing the individual variation that a model needs to generalize to unseen patients. We study this problem in the setting of Paroxysmal Atrial Fibrillation(PAF) detection from RR-interval(RRI) sequences and propose a patient-aware contrastive objective that forms positive pairs only from same-patient, same-class segments, preserving each patient's own sinus rhythm(SR) baseline while still pushing the two classes apart. Examining the learned embeddings directly, our objective achieves the most consistent per-patient SR structure (cohesion $0.850$ vs. $0.800$ for supervised contrastive loss (SupCon) and $0.772$ for binary cross-entropy (BCE)). We also identify that BCE produces the cleanest global class separation yet the most disordered per-patient structure. This is precisely why a linear probe trained on its features breaks down on unseen patients. On the IRIDIA-AF dataset, the resulting representation reaches a patient-independent Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUROC) of $0.989 \pm 0.003$ with $2.6\times$ lower seed variance than supervised contrastive baselines.These results highlight that per-subject geometric consistency, rather than global class separability, is key to robust cross-patient generalization.

</details>


### [473] [A Spectral Theory of Normalized Corrected GNN Propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23572)
*Qihan Chen,Wei Li,Meng Qin,Jianfeng Hou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对归一化修正GNN传播建立了谱理论，证明了在特定条件下经过O(log n)层传播后仍能保持类别判别信号，并给出了精确恢复和多类部分恢复定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究去除度平稳分量的归一化修正传播算子是否能在深层GNN中保留类别判别信号，解决过平滑问题。

Method: 构建归一化修正邻接矩阵（去除度平稳分量），基于Contextual随机块模型进行理论分析，推导高概率精确恢复定理和多类部分恢复定理。

Result: 证明了在稠密多对数增长条件下（p≥C log^B n/n），经过k=O(log n)层传播后可实现精确恢复；多类场景下多数节点向类别中心收缩。

Conclusion: 归一化修正GNN传播能有效缓解过平滑，在理论保证下深层传播仍保持分类能力，实验验证了理论对深度、图信号和特征噪声的依赖关系。

Abstract: We develop a spectral theory for \emph{normalized corrected GNN propagation}. The object of study is the symmetric normalized adjacency with its degree-stationary component removed, matching the normalization used by standard GCN-style models while isolating the stationary direction most directly tied to oversmoothing. The central theoretical question is whether this corrected normalized operator preserves class-discriminative signal after many propagation layers. Our main result is a high-probability exact-recovery theorem for the binary Contextual Stochastic Block Model after \(k=O(\log n)\) propagation steps in the dense polylogarithmic regime \(p\ge C\log^B n/n\), for any fixed \(B>4\), under explicit graph-signal and feature-SNR conditions. We also establish a multi-class partial recovery theorem showing contraction toward class centers for most nodes. Synthetic and real node-classification experiments are included as empirical checks of the theory's predicted dependence on depth, graph signal, and feature noise.

</details>


### [474] [Solve for the Hyperparameter, Skip the Search: Kolmogorov-Optimal Scaling Laws for Spline Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23575)
*Yong Yi Bay,Kathleen A. Yearick*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出KORE方法，通过闭式求解样条回归的最优分辨率（复杂度参数），替代传统的网格搜索超参数调优，在保证精度的同时将模型拟合次数减少约8倍。该方法基于Kolmogorov n-width理论、ANOVA分解和PRESS恒等式，实现了计算效率的显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统超参数调优依赖网格搜索，计算成本高昂。作者发现对于样条回归，最优分辨率可以通过闭式求解得到，无需穷举搜索。

Method: 利用经典逼近理论（Kolmogorov n-width）将平方偏差表示为分辨率的已知幂函数；基维度为分辨率的显式多项式；通过PRESS恒等式从单次拟合得到留一法误差。结合ANOVA分解扩展到高维，提出KORE算法：仅需两个试点分辨率拟合，求解2x2系统得到偏差和噪声尺度，再代入闭式公式得到最优分辨率。

Result: 在高达80维的加性和稀疏成对目标上，KORE匹配穷举3折交叉验证和经典准则（GCV、Cp、AIC、BIC），模型拟合次数减少约8倍；在36个真实表格数据集上，在单位计算量的准确率方面排名第一，优于调优后的boosting和核机器。

Conclusion: 当复杂度存在于低交互阶时，求解最优分辨率优于搜索它，为超参数调优提供了一种更高效的理论驱动方案。

Abstract: Hyperparameter tuning almost always means search: fit the model at every value on a grid, score each by cross-validation, and keep the winner. For spline regression that search is unnecessary. The optimal resolution can be solved for in closed form, to the accuracy an exhaustive search reaches, at a fraction of the compute. Three ingredients make this possible: classical approximation theory pins the squared bias to a known power of the resolution G, exactly the Kolmogorov n-width of the smoothness class; the basis dimension is an explicit polynomial in G; and leave-one-out error follows from a single fit via the PRESS identity. Balancing the two known curves gives the minimizer analytically. We extend this calculus to many coordinates by replacing ambient input dimension with interaction order, the number of active low-order components in an ANOVA decomposition, yielding a scaling law in which the optimal resolution and error are power functions of the effective density (sample size per active component), with input dimension absent from the exponent. The law becomes an algorithm. KORE (Kolmogorov-optimal Order-aware Resolution Estimation) fits two pilot resolutions, solves a leverage-calibrated 2x2 system for the bias and noise scales, and evaluates the closed-form plug-in resolution with a tiny leave-one-out certificate: about a dozen fits instead of a full grid sweep, with a consistency guarantee as the sample grows. Across additive and sparse pairwise targets up to 80 input dimensions, KORE matches exhaustive 3-fold cross-validation and the full classical ladder (GCV, Mallows' Cp, AIC, BIC) while fitting roughly 8x fewer models; on 36 real tabular datasets it ranks first among 21 methods in accuracy per unit of compute, ahead of tuned boosters and kernel machines. When complexity lives in low interaction order, solving for the resolution beats searching for it.

</details>


### [475] [It's Much Easier for Neural Networks to learn Game of Life Dynamics with the Right Activation Function: Polynomial Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23587)
*Tashin Ahmed,Q. Tyrell Davis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，通过选择合适的激活函数（特别是二次多项式激活函数），即使是极小的神经网络也能可靠地学习康威生命游戏规则，挑战了以往认为需要大规模网络的观点，并倡导将元胞自动机作为机器学习研究的测试领域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究指出，能够可靠学习康威生命游戏的神经网络规模与最小可表示该元胞自动机的网络之间存在巨大差距。本文希望从"搜索问题"回归到"学习问题"，通过引入合适的归纳偏置来弥合这一差距。

Method: 作者测试了多种激活函数（包括二次多项式激活函数）的网络变体，对比了默认的ReLU激活函数，并考察了在有无学习神经权重情况下的表现。

Result: 多种替代激活函数显著优于默认的ReLU，特别是2次多项式激活函数能够持续学习生命游戏动态，即使在没有学习权重的情况下也能成功。

Conclusion: 匹配任务的归纳偏置能显著降低所需网络规模，应避免默认选择大规模网络的简单做法。建议将元胞自动机作为机器学习（特别是科学计算、物理深度学习、可解释机器学习）的简单测试领域。

Abstract: Previous work has found a gap between the scale of neural networks that reliably learn Conway's Game of Life, and minimal networks capable of representing the classic cellular automaton with hard-coded parameter values. Viewing neural network learning as a search process suggests a dependence on networks large enough to contain sub-networks with lucky initializations (sometimes known as 'winning tickets') that actually learn the task. In this work, we reorient our perspective from discovering Life rules as a search problem back to a learning problem, and reason that with fitting inductive biases, the problem should be much more amenable to minimal networks. We find that network variants with several alternative activation functions meaningfully outperform the default choice of Rectified Linear Units, and in particular, that a 2nd degree polynomial activation function consistently learns Life dynamics with or without the benefit of learning neural weights. Our results provide an informative demonstration of the benefits of matching learning to the task at hand and challenge the easy default choice of scale for all problems. In particular, we advocate for the use of cellular automata as simple test domains for developing strategies that can benefit machine learning for science, physics-based deep learning, and interpretable machine learning.

</details>


### [476] [Quantifying the Agreement Between Data-Influence and Data-Similarity to Understand LLM Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23591)
*Christopher J. Anders,Henrique Da Silva Gameiro,Nico Daheim,Mohammad Emtiyaz Khan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了两种用于追溯LLM输出的方法——数据相似性与数据影响力，发现两者排序高度一致但存在非对称性：数据相似性的顶部文档在数据影响力下的排序更稳定。利用这一特性，可以用低成本的数据相似性结合高成本的数据影响力获得更优的性价比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有研究在ground-truth任务上比较了数据相似性与数据影响力，但尚无针对输出追溯场景的对比分析。本文填补了这一空白，旨在精确量化两种度量之间的共性与差异。

Method: 首先根据两种度量分别对训练文档进行排序，然后计算两个排序之间的重叠程度。实验涵盖OLMo2-1B、Qwen3-1.7B、LlaMa3.2-1B、Gemma3-1B和GPT2等多种模型。

Result: 两种排序存在显著的一致性，但呈现非对称性：数据相似性的顶部文档在数据影响力下排名更一致，反之则不然。

Conclusion: 可以利用这种非对称性，先用低成本的数据相似性进行初步筛选，再用高成本的数据影响力对结果进行精炼，从而在成本与准确性之间取得更优的平衡。

Abstract: One way to understand LLM behavior is to trace its output back to the training data. Two types of measures are commonly used for output tracing: data-similarity and data-influence. The former is cheaper while the latter is believed to be more accurate. Even though many works have compared them for ground-truth tasks, no such comparisons exist for output tracing. Here, we fill this gap and precisely quantify the commonalities and differences between the two measures. We do this by first ranking the training documents according to each measure and then computing the overlap between the two rankings. Our main finding is that the two rankings agree significantly, but there is an asymmetry between them: The top documents of data-similarity are assigned more consistent ranks by data-influence than the other way around. This result is valid across a range of experiments involving OLMo2-1B, Qwen3-1.7B, LlaMa3.2-1B, Gemma3-1B, and GPT2. We exploit the asymmetry to obtain a favorable cost-accuracy trade-off by using the costly data-influence to refine the results of data-similarity.

</details>


### [477] [MORL-A2C: Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Reranker for Optimizing Healthiness in MOPI-HFRS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23603)
*Aarya Vasantlal,Joshua Zolla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MORL-A2C，一种基于强化学习的序列决策扩展方法，用于多目标个性化食物推荐系统，在牺牲少量推荐质量的情况下显著提升健康对齐度（H-Score从46.05%提升至69.57%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有食物推荐系统忽略营养健康因素，且MOPI-HFRS依赖静态单步优化，无法捕捉饮食决策的序列特性。

Method: 采用冻结GNN嵌入、Advantage Actor-Critic算法进行K步重排序，并通过行为克隆进行策略热启动，同时修正了基线评估中的bug。

Result: 在宏营养素基准上，Recall@20从25.64%降至23.61%，NDCG@20从23.52%降至20.64%，但H-Score@20从46.05%提升至69.57%。

Conclusion: 基于策略的序列优化能够有效导航多目标食物推荐中健康与偏好的权衡。

Abstract: Unhealthy dietary behavior continues to be a persistent public health issue in the United States, exacerbated by recommendation systems that prioritize user preference without considering nutritional health. The Multi-Objective Personalized Interpretable Health-aware Food Recommendation System (MOPI-HFRS), from which this work extends, addresses this by jointly optimizing preference, health, and diversity through Pareto-based optimization. However, this approach relies on static, per-step tradeoff solutions that fail to capture the sequential nature of dietary decision-making. We introduce MORL-A2C, a sequential decision-making extension to MOPI-HFRS targeting the health-preference axis. Leveraging frozen GNN embeddings, MORL-A2C formulates recommendation as a K-step reranking problem using an Advantage Actor-Critic algorithm with a scalarized relevance/health reward. The policy is warm-started via behavior cloning against a dot-product ranker derived from frozen embeddings. We also identify and correct a non-trivial bug in the MOPI-HFRS evaluation pipeline that understated baseline performance; all results are reported against the corrected baseline. On the macro-nutrient benchmark, MORL-A2C achieves a modest reduction in ranking quality (Recall@20: 25.64% to 23.61%, NDCG@20: 23.52% to 20.64%) in exchange for a substantial improvement in health alignment (H-Score@20: 46.05% to 69.57%), with consistent trends on the full-nutrient benchmark. These findings validate that policy-driven sequential optimization can effectively navigate the health-preference trade-off in multi-objective food recommendation.

</details>


### [478] [Scaling Linear Mode Connectivity and Merging to Billion Parameter Pretrained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23607)
*Tianyi Li,Zhiqiang Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种双学习框架（Dual-Learned Matching），通过对功能等价的权重变换进行双向优化，首次在十亿参数级别的预训练Transformer上实现了近乎零损失的线性模式连接（LMC），显著降低了插值障碍，支持更可靠的模型合并。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LMC方法通常只从单一模型端点优化插值路径，限制了其在大型预训练Transformer上的可扩展性和有效性，无法处理大规模架构中参数对称性带来的插值障碍。

Method: 1) 应用参数化的功能保持权重变换来对齐功能等价的解；2) 提出双学习过程，让两个模型联合学习各自的变换，朝向共享的线性插值路径进行双向优化。

Result: 1) 在中等参数的语言模型上，WikiText数据集实现近乎零损失屏障；2) 视觉领域ViT-L在整个插值路径上保持69%以上的ImageNet Top-1准确率；3) 现代十亿参数LLM仅表现出很小的损失屏障。

Conclusion: 合理解决参数对称性可以使大型预训练Transformer通过简单的线性路径连接和合并，显著提升插值性能，为大规模模型合并提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Linear mode connectivity (LMC) provides a promising foundation for understanding and merging independently trained neural networks, but existing methods typically optimize the interpolation path from only one model endpoint, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for large pretrained transformers. We propose a novel and scalable framework for enabling LMC-based model merging to {\em billion-parameter pretrained transformers}. Our method applies properly parameterized functionality-preserving weight transformations to align functionally equivalent solutions, and introduces a dual learning procedure in which both models jointly learn their corresponding transformations toward a shared linear interpolation path. This bidirectional optimization substantially reduces interpolation barriers and enables more reliable merging across large-scale architectures. Empirically, we show that our approach achieves near-zero loss barriers on WikiText for language models with medium-sized parameters, representing, to our knowledge, the first demonstration of near-barrier-free linear connectivity at this scale. In the vision domain, ViT-L maintains above 69\% ImageNet top-1 accuracy throughout the interpolation path, while modern billion-parameter LLMs exhibit only small loss barriers. These results suggest that properly resolving parameter symmetries enables large pretrained Transformers to be connected and merged through simple linear paths with substantially improved interpolation performance. Code: https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching .

</details>


### [479] [Discovering Latent Groups for Robust Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23609)
*Ankur Garg,Ulrich Aïvodji,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou,Vincent Michalski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出神经分类树（NCT），通过树形架构编码子组结构，无需子组监督即可鲁棒地解缠冲突子组，并在五个基准上取得与最先进方法竞争的鲁棒性，同时提供强可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型利用虚假相关性，在平均精度高的情况下对代表性不足的子组失效。现有方法依赖子组标注或伪标签调整参数，但推理时仅输出类别预测，无法提供样本潜在子组的洞察。

Method: 提出神经分类树（NCT），采用树形架构编码子组结构。每个样本根据预测正确性被路由到树的"简单"或"困难"节点，并将这些路由作为下一轮的伪标签，无需子组监督即可解缠冲突子组。

Result: 在五个涵盖二分类和多分类虚假相关性的基准上评估，NCT能一致地隔离少数子组，在可解释性与鲁棒性方面与最先进方法竞争。

Conclusion: NCT不仅通过树形拓扑提供了模型架构与数据潜在组结构之间的透明映射，还实现了与SOTA方法相当的鲁棒性，有效解决了虚假相关性下的子组不平衡问题。

Abstract: Machine learning models exploit spurious correlations, achieving high average accuracy but failing disproportionately on underrepresented subgroups. Existing methods address this by adjusting network parameters, guided either by subgroup annotations or inferred pseudo-group labels. Yet at inference, these methods produce only a class prediction, with no insight into a sample's latent subgroup. We propose neural classification trees (NCT), a framework that achieves robustness by encoding subgroup structure in its tree-shaped architecture. By routing each sample to an "easy" or "hard" node of this tree -- based on prediction correctness -- and reusing these routes as pseudo-labels for the next iteration, NCT disentangles conflicting subgroups, without requiring subgroup supervision. We evaluate NCT on five benchmarks spanning binary and multi-class spurious correlations. Our experiments show that the learned tree topology provides strong interpretability by consistently isolating minority subgroups, which provides a transparent mapping between the model architecture and the data's latent group structure, while yielding competitive robustness with state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [480] [DiT-Reward: Generative Representations for Text-to-Image Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23626)
*Yuanming Yang,Guoqing Ma,Bo Wang,Yuan Zhang,Wei Tang,Chenyi Li,Haoyang Huang,Nan Duan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DiT-Reward方法，利用预训练文本到图像扩散变换器（DiT）作为奖励模型，在图像生成质量评估任务上超越了现有方法HPSv3，并在四个偏好基准测试中取得最优结果，同时实现了1.65倍的推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究生成式表示学习是否也能支持生成图像的评估，即研究文本到图像奖励预测作为生成式表示学习的下游任务。

Method: 将预训练文本到图像扩散变换器转换为奖励模型，通过处理接近干净的图像隐编码，并跨变换器层聚合文本条件图像表示。在相同的训练数据混合下与HPSv3对比，同时采用Flow-GRPO优化Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large。

Result: DiT-Reward在HPDv2上达85.6%，在HPDv3上达77.6%，均超越HPSv3；生成骨干网络冻结时仍能提取有效偏好预测；中间到后期层表示最佳，且生成骨干容量越大性能越好；在优化Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large时，真实感提升明显，推理速度提升1.65倍。

Conclusion: 预训练生成式DiT可提供具有迁移能力的表示，用于奖励建模和策略优化，表明生成模型本身可以同时支持生成与评估任务。

Abstract: Can representations learned for image generation also support the evaluation of generated images? We study text-to-image reward prediction as a downstream task of generative representation learning. To this end, we introduce DiT-Reward, which converts a pretrained text-to-image Diffusion Transformer into a reward model by processing near-clean image latents and aggregating text-conditioned image representations across transformer layers. Under the same training data mixture as HPSv3, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 on all four evaluated preference benchmarks, reaching 85.6% on HPDv2 and 77.6% on HPDv3. When the generative backbone is frozen, a lightweight learned head can still extract meaningful preference predictions from its representations. Probing across depth further reveals that downstream reward performance is strongest in the middle-to-late layers and benefits from combining representations across different stages. We also observe consistent positive scaling with generative backbone capacity. Finally, when used to optimize Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large with Flow-GRPO, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 along the matched training trajectory, with particularly clear gains in realism. Direct latent scoring also achieves a 1.65x inference speedup over HPSv3 with comparable peak memory. These results show that pretrained generative DiTs provide transferable representations for reward modeling and policy optimization.

</details>


### [481] [Muown Implicitly Performs Angular Step-size Decay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23637)
*Florian Hübler,Kai Lion,Antonio Orvieto,Niao He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AngularMuown优化器，将Muown的方向更新等价为黎曼步长，解耦角步长与径向幅度更新，在多项实验中超越Muown，并已在modded nanoGPT速度竞赛中领先。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muown优化器虽表现优异，但其方向更新的步长稳定性机制尚不明确，且幅度与角步长耦合，限制了对优化过程更精细的控制。

Method: 将Muown的方向更新重新解释为归一化方向上的黎曼步长，将角步长从幅度更新中解耦出来，提出AngularMuown，直接优化归一化方向并使用可调的角乘子。

Result: AngularMuown在modded nanoGPT速度竞赛的每优化器类别中领先，并在Qwen2-0.5B及1.1B参数MoE模型上验证了其可扩展性。

Conclusion: 解耦角步长与径向更新能更稳定高效地优化Transformer，AngularMuown为矩阵感知优化器提供了理论与实践上的改进方向。

Abstract: Matrix-aware optimizers such as Muon and Muown have recently shown strong empirical performance for pre-training Transformers. In particular, Muown separates each weight matrix into row magnitudes and an un-normalized direction variable, updating the former with Adam and the latter with Muon. We show that the directional update of Muown is equivalent to a Riemannian step on the normalized directions, while the magnitude of the un-normalized parameterization only modulates the angular step size. This explains the step-size stability of Muown and suggests making the angular step size explicit. The resulting method, AngularMuown, optimizes directly over the normalized directions and uses a schedulable angular multiplier decoupled from the radial magnitude update. AngularMuown improves over Muown and, at the time of writing, a preliminary version is leading the per-optimizer category of the modded nanoGPT speedrunning competition. Further experiments on Qwen2-0.5B, and 1.1B parameter mixture-of-experts models confirm the algorithm scales beyond small models. An implementation of the algorithm is available at https://github.com/fhueb/angular-muown

</details>


### [482] [Learning Process Rewards via Success Visitation Matching for Efficient RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23640)
*Raymond Tsao,Andrew Wagenmaker,Sergey Levine*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种通过训练判别器区分成功/失败轨迹，将稀疏奖励转化为密集过程奖励的方法，加速强化学习微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习中自然奖励通常是稀疏的（任务完成才给+1），导致信用分配困难，训练缓慢或无效。

Method: 训练一个判别器区分成功与失败的轨迹，用其输出作为密集的过程奖励，激励策略匹配成功轨迹的状态-动作访问模式，同时避免失败轨迹的模式。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界的机器人操控任务中，该方法相比直接最大化稀疏奖励，显著加快了强化学习微调的性能。

Conclusion: 该方法在不改变最优策略的前提下，提供了密集的进度反馈，有效解决了稀疏奖励下的信用分配问题。

Abstract: In many modern applications of reinforcement learning (RL), the natural reward for a task of interest is inherently sparse: a reward of 0 is given everywhere except when the task is completed, when a reward of +1 is given. Training a policy to maximize such a sparse reward requires solving a challenging credit assignment problem, leading to slow or ineffective RL improvement. We propose a simple approach to transform a sparse outcome reward into a dense process reward. Our approach relies on training a discriminator to distinguish between previous successful and unsuccessful episodes, and using this discriminator to incentivize the RL-learned policy to match the state-action visitations of successful episodes, while avoiding those of unsuccessful episodes. By incentivizing the policy to match the visitations over all states, not just those that correspond to task success, this reward provides dense feedback on whether progress is being made towards task completion, and, we show, provably achieves this without changing the optimal policy. Focusing on finetuning of robotic control policies, we demonstrate that our approach leads to significantly faster RL finetuning performance on both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks, as compared to simply maximizing the sparse outcome reward.

</details>


### [483] [Dynamic estimation of slowly varying sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23655)
*Prashant Gokhale,Mikhail Khodak,Sandeep Silwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个通用框架，用于对缓慢变化的序列元素进行连续逼近，适用于多种线性和非线性函数。该框架通过局部自适应分配估计预算，实现了更优的路径长度型变化界 $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$，并支持动态估计序列变化，改进了先前动态迹估计中 $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ 的界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作表明，当序列元素变化缓慢时，重用历史查询可以降低迹估计成本，但适用范围有限，且预算分配仅基于最坏情况变化量，对存在罕见突变的稳定序列效率低下。此外，所有先前工作均假设变化量上界已知。本文旨在解决这些局限性。

Method: 提出了一个通用框架，将序列估计方法推广到多种线性与非线性函数（如矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分、PDE边值问题）；开发了一种局部自适应算法，根据局部变化量 $α_t$ 缩放估计预算；在某些情况下，可以以几乎无额外成本的方式在线估计变化量。

Result: 获得了路径长度型变化界 $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$，优于之前 $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ 的界；实现了对序列变化的在线自适应估计。

Conclusion: 该框架使得序列逼近工具变得通用且自适应，改进了动态迹估计的最新保证。

Abstract: We consider the problem of sequentially approximating functions of each element in a slowly-varying sequence, i.e. one where the magnitude $α_i$ of the difference between the elements at positions $i$ and $i-1$ is small. Recent work on implicit trace estimation shows that when $α_t$ is small, reusing queries to past sequence elements can reduce the overall cost [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021; Woodruff et al., NeurIPS~2022]. We introduce a framework generalizing this to a variety of linear and nonlinear functions on diverse vector spaces, obtaining novel sequential estimation results for matrix powers, spectral densities, Monte Carlo integration, and a boundary value problem from partial differential equations~(PDEs). Furthermore, we develop a novel algorithm for use with this framework that locally scales the estimation budget with $α_t$, obtaining sharper path-length-style variation bounds of form $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$ on the cost of estimating a sequence of length $m$. This improves upon the previous implicit trace estimation bound of $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021], which is achieved by fixing the query budget using the worst-case $α_i$ and is thus inefficient for stable sequences with rare bursts. Lastly, while all past work assumes a known bound on $α_i$, we show in certain cases how the changes can be estimated on-the-fly with (nearly) no added cost.
